question: The museum ____ next month to celebrate the Science & Technology Festival.
explanation: next month 将来时间，museum 与 decorate 被动关系，用一般将来时被动 will be decorated。
common_mistake: 容易忽略被动含义而误选will decorate。

question: — ____ I park my car here for a while? — No, you mustn't. Do you see the sign "NO"?
explanation: May I...? 请求许可。回答 No, you mustn't 表示禁止。Would 用于委婉请求，Must 必须。
common_mistake: 容易混淆May I和Must I的提问方式。

question: — Must I do the project on my own? — No, you ____. You can work with your classmates.
explanation: Must I...? 的否定回答用 No, you needn't（不必）。mustn't 表示禁止。
common_mistake: 容易误用mustn't（禁止）回答Must提问。

question: Michael ____ in a school in Yunnan from February to June next year.
explanation: next year 提示一般将来时，用 will teach。
common_mistake: 容易忽略next year的标志作用。

question: The film Operation Red Sea ____ a lot of praise since its first show months ago.
explanation: since 提示现在完成时，主语 The film 是单数，用 has won。
common_mistake: 容易误用一般过去时，忽略since提示的"从过去持续到现在"。

question: The debate on whether to keep pets ____ forty minutes yesterday afternoon.
explanation: yesterday afternoon 提示一般过去时，last 意为“持续”，过去式是 lasted。
common_mistake: 容易混淆last的动词和形容词用法。

question: Put some milk into the flour, break two eggs and then ____ them.
explanation: 本句为祈使句并列结构，and then 后接动词原形 mix，意为“搅拌”。mixture 是名词，mixed 和 mixes 不能用于祈使句。
common_mistake: 容易保留名词形式mixture。

question: More and more foreigners are learning to ____ Chinese nowadays.
explanation: learn to do sth.，需用动词原形 speak，speak Chinese 说中文。speech 是名词，speaking 是动名词/现在分词，speaks 是第三人称单数。
common_mistake: 容易保留名词形式speech。

question: It's raining heavily. I'd ____ you call a taxi home now.
explanation: I'd 是 I would 的缩写，'d 后接动词原形。I would suggest (that) you (should) call... 意为“我建议你……”。suggest 是动词“建议”。
common_mistake: 容易保留名词形式suggestion。

question: Let's hope that all our troubles will ____ soon.
explanation: disappear 是不及物动词，意为“消失”。希望烦恼很快消失。appear 出现，逻辑相反。will 后接动词原形。
common_mistake: 容易误用appear(出现)，忽略语义应为"消失"。

question: We are not allowed to ____ our earth.
explanation: be allowed to do sth.，需接动词原形 pollute，意为“污染”。pollution 是名词。
common_mistake: 容易保留名词形式pollution。

question: Cathy, would you please ____ the parcel for me?
explanation: Would you please + 动词原形，表示礼貌请求。post 意为“邮寄”。postage 是名词，posting 和 posted 不用于此。
common_mistake: 容易保留名词形式postage。

question: You may ____ either to go to the seaside or to have a barbecue in a country park.
explanation: may 后接动词原形 choose，意为“选择”。choice 是名词。
common_mistake: 容易保留名词形式choice或误用过去式chose。

question: While we ____ Peter's birthday, the lights went off suddenly.
explanation: while 引导的时间状语从句表示过去某时刻正在进行的动作，用过去进行时 were celebrating。
common_mistake: 容易忽略while引导的从句需要用进行时态。

question: "Your job is to ____ customers well. Please keep it in mind," the manager told the waiters.
explanation: to 后接动词原形 serve，意为“服务”。service 是名词。
common_mistake: 容易保留名词形式service。

question: The speaker ____ the audience to sign up for computer courses if they were serious about earning more money.
explanation: encourage sb. to do sth. 鼓励某人做某事。if 从句 were 提示过去时，主句用 encouraged。
common_mistake: 容易误用名词courage或忘记过去时态。

question: The movie Kungfu Panda II is sure to ____ a large number of teenagers.
explanation: be sure to do sth.，用动词原形 attract，意为“吸引”。attractive 是形容词。
common_mistake: 容易保留形容词attractive。

question: To improve your writing skills, you'd better ____ a habit of reading.
explanation: had better ('d better) + 动词原形，develop a habit 养成习惯。development 是名词。
common_mistake: 容易保留名词development。

question: It is not wise of young people to ____ their jobs from time to time.
explanation: It is + adj. + of sb. to do sth.，用动词原形 change，意为“更换工作”。changeable 是形容词。
common_mistake: 容易保留形容词changeable。

question: Shops are not allowed to ____ cigarettes to anyone under the age of 18.
explanation: be allowed to do sth.，用动词原形 sell。sale 是名词。
common_mistake: 容易保留名词sale或误用过去式sold。

question: Many people enjoy reading e-books, but I ____ it as it's bad for the eyes.
explanation: but 表示转折，dislike 意为“不喜欢”，因为对眼睛有害。unlike 是介词“不像”。
common_mistake: 容易误用like或unlike(介词/不像)。

question: Education is one of the most powerful ways to ____ one's mind.
explanation: to do sth. 用动词原形，enrich 意为“充实（思想）”。rich 是形容词。
common_mistake: 容易保留形容词rich。

question: I have something important to ____ with you through video talk.
explanation: to do 不定式作后置定语，用动词原形 discuss，意为“讨论”。discussion 是名词。
common_mistake: 容易保留名词discussion。

question: Some wild animals may ____ forever if we don't stop hunting them.
explanation: may 后接动词原形，disappear 意为“消失”。appear 出现，逻辑相反。
common_mistake: 容易误用appear，应注意语义是"消失"而非"出现"。

question: Scientists often ____ that farmers use natural ways to grow fruits.
explanation: often 提示一般现在时，主语 Scientists 复数，用动词原形 suggest，意为“建议”。suggestion 是名词。
common_mistake: 容易保留名词suggestion。

question: I will never ____ the days I spent with my host family in Britain.
explanation: will 后接动词原形 forget，意为“忘记”。forgetful 是形容词“健忘的”。
common_mistake: 容易保留形容词forgetful或误用过去式forgot。

question: We'd better ____ off our mobile phones. The meeting will start in a minute.
explanation: had better ('d better) + 动词原形，表示“最好做某事”。turn off 关闭。
common_mistake: 容易在had better后误加to。

question: Our headmaster asked us ____ a report on how to protect wild animals.
explanation: ask sb. to do sth. 要求某人做某事，用不定式 to write。
common_mistake: 容易在ask后误用动词原形(不带to)。

question: Before going to the History Museum, our teacher told us ____ the public rules.
explanation: tell sb. to do sth. 告诉某人做某事，用不定式 to obey。
common_mistake: 容易在tell后误用动词原形。

question: The woman feels that she should let her son ____ his own decision this time.
explanation: let sb. do sth. 让某人做某事，后接省略 to 的不定式，即动词原形 make。decision 搭配 make。
common_mistake: 容易在let后误加to make。

question: The abacus was used extensively ____ years ago.
explanation: be used to do sth. 表示“被用来做某事”。不定式 to calculate 说明算盘的用途，答案正确。
common_mistake: 容易混淆be used to do(被用来做)和be used to doing(习惯于做)。

question: The football is light enough for a little child ____.
explanation: enough for sb. to do sth. 结构。raise 是及物动词，意为“举起”，逻辑宾语是 football，无需再加 it。rise 是不及物动词，意为“升起”，不符合语境。
common_mistake: 容易混淆raise(及物)和rise(不及物)的用法。

question: Much of the area contains plants and animals ____ nowhere else in the world.
explanation: plants and animals found nowhere else 中 found 是过去分词作后置定语，表示“在世界其他地方找不到的动植物”，被动含义，正确。
common_mistake: 容易误用to find(不定式)或finding(现在分词)。

question: Viki, the chimpanzee, knew ____ before a picture book after the scientists had taught her for a long time.
explanation: “疑问词 + 不定式”作宾语。knew what to do 表示“知道做什么”，即知道如何翻看图画书。how to do 缺少宾语 it，故 what to do 正确。
common_mistake: 容易误选how to do，注意do是及物动词需要宾语。

question: He could hardly make himself ____ by others because his English was poor.
explanation: make oneself understood 是固定结构，表示“使别人明白自己的意思”。understood 是过去分词作宾补，表被动。
common_mistake: 容易误用understand(动词原形)，忽略被动含义。

question: ____ his goal of studying abroad, he tried every means ____ money.
explanation: 第一个空用不定式 To reach 作目的状语；第二个空 tried every means to make money，“手段/方法 to do”用不定式。
common_mistake: 容易在第一空误用Reaching(现在分词)。

question: As we all know, it's not polite to keep others ____ for a long time.
explanation: keep sb. doing sth. 意为“让某人一直做某事”。waiting 正确，表示让别人久等。
common_mistake: 容易在keep后误用不定式to wait。

question: You had better ____ because you have to drive back home.
explanation: had better not do sth. 表示“最好别做某事”，后接动词原形。not drink 正确。
common_mistake: 容易误用don't drink或not to drink。

question: Stop ____ about the traffic. Just think about what we can do to improve it.
explanation: stop doing 意为“停止做某事（正在做的事）”，stop to do 意为“停下来去做另一件事”。此处停止抱怨用 complaining。
common_mistake: 容易混淆stop doing(停止做)和stop to do(停下来去做)。

question: Don't jump to a conclusion! Let's ____ the problem first.
explanation: Let's 后接动词原形。Let's discuss the problem first. 表示“我们先讨论问题吧”。
common_mistake: 容易在let's后误加to。

question: Even Tony's granddaughter, a five-year-old girl, asked him ____ smoking.
explanation: ask sb. to do sth. 要求某人做某事。用不定式 to give up。
common_mistake: 容易在ask后误用动词原形。

question: Harry has decided ____ an online shop after graduating from school.
explanation: decide to do sth. 决定做某事。用不定式 to open。
common_mistake: 容易在decide后误用动词原形。

question: My friend invited me ____ the art club, and I accepted it with pleasure.
explanation: invite sb. to do sth. 邀请某人做某事。用不定式 to join。
common_mistake: 容易在invite后误用动词原形。

question: I can't tell you what she said. I've promised ____ it a secret.
explanation: promise to do sth. 承诺做某事。用不定式 to keep。
common_mistake: 容易在promise后误用keeping。

question: Vivian refuses ____ her children to the weekend training center for extra classes.
explanation: refuse to do sth. 拒绝做某事。用不定式 to send。
common_mistake: 容易在refuse后误用sending。

question: Mr. Zhou is good at cooking and he has decided ____ his own restaurant.
explanation: decide to do sth. 决定做某事。用不定式 to open。
common_mistake: 容易在decide后误用动词原形。

question: Susan finally became a popular singer after she practised ____ for years.
explanation: practise doing sth. 练习做某事，后接动名词。singing 正确。
common_mistake: 容易在practise后误用不定式to sing。

question: Richard turned off the computer after he had finished ____ the email.
explanation: finish 后只能接动名词 doing。finish writing 表示“写完”。
common_mistake: 容易在finish后误用不定式to write。

question: At the police station, the young man admitted ____ my classmate's bicycle.
explanation: admit doing sth. 承认做过某事，后接动名词。stealing 正确。
common_mistake: 容易在admit后误用不定式to steal。

question: A lot of people watch TV only ____ time.
explanation: only to kill time 作目的状语，表示“仅仅为了消磨时间”。用不定式。
common_mistake: 容易误用killing。

question: After ____ in the storm for nearly one hour, the helicopter landed safely at last.
explanation: after 是介词，后接动名词 flying。表示“在暴风雨中飞行近一小时后”。
common_mistake: 容易在介词after后误用动词原形fly。

question: The lights were turned off in many buildings in Sydney on March 31 to help people become more aware of global ____.
explanation: global warming 是固定说法，意为“全球变暖”。warming 在此是动名词，正确。
common_mistake: 容易误用warmth(温暖)或warmer。

question: Each individual feels like ____ a nice dictionary for his or her study.
explanation: feel like doing sth. 想要做某事，后接动名词。having 正确。
common_mistake: 容易在feel like后误用不定式to have。

question: He is in low spirits today. I'm afraid he has no hope ____ the final game.
explanation: no hope of doing sth. 表示“没有做某事的希望”，介词 of 后接动名词。of winning 正确。
common_mistake: 容易误用to win或for winning。

question: To avoid ____ by others, he slipped out of the meeting room.
explanation: avoid 后接动名词。句意为“避免被别人看见”，应用被动形式的动名词 being seen。
common_mistake: 容易忽略被动含义而误选seeing。

question: After you finish ____ the classroom, don't forget ____ the door.
explanation: finish doing sth. 用 cleaning；forget to do sth. 忘记去做某事（未做），此处指别忘了锁门，用 to lock。
common_mistake: 容易混淆forget to do(忘记去做)和forget doing(忘记做过)。

question: The retired couple enjoy ____ photos. They always go out with their cameras.
explanation: enjoy doing sth. 喜欢做某事，后接动名词。taking 正确。
common_mistake: 容易在enjoy后误用不定式to take。

question: I wouldn't mind ____ a roommate. We can help each other and save money as well.
explanation: mind doing sth. 介意做某事，后接动名词。having 正确。
common_mistake: 容易在mind后误用不定式to have。

question: Martin was so busy ____ the old that he gave up his part time job.
explanation: be busy doing sth. 忙于做某事，用动名词 helping。
common_mistake: 容易在busy后误用不定式to help。

question: After she finished ____ the story, Alice wrote a review for her school newspaper.
explanation: finish doing sth. 完成做某事，后接动名词 reading。
common_mistake: 容易在finish后误用不定式to read。

question: Sue practices ____ the violin hard and often gives wonderful performances.
explanation: practise doing sth. 练习做某事，后接动名词 playing。
common_mistake: 容易在practice后误用不定式to play。

question: Rainforests also help ____ the weather. In my opinion, our future depends on ____ the rainforests.
explanation: help (to) do sth. 用 to control；depend on doing 依赖做某事，用 saving。
common_mistake: 容易在介词on后误用不定式to save。

question: If the temperature is raised high enough, smoke can be seen ____.
explanation: see sth. doing 看见某物正在做某事。smoke 与 rise 是主动关系，用现在分词 rising 作主补。
common_mistake: 容易混淆rise(不及物/上升)和raise(及物/举起)。

question: Mr. Compton is not a little ____ about his own health.
explanation: not a little 相当，非常。be worried about 对……担心，用形容词化的过去分词 worried。
common_mistake: 容易混淆-ed形容词(人的感受)和-ing形容词(事物的特性)。

question: Switzerland's extensive railway system is ____ and comfortable and will allow you to fully enjoy the scenery.
explanation: relaxing 指事物“令人放松的”，与 comfortable 并列作表语。relaxed 指人感觉放松，不合主语。
common_mistake: 容易混淆relaxing(令人放松的/指物)和relaxed(感到放松的/指人)。

question: The old lady, together with her grandchildren, ____ in the living room, talking about the good old days.
explanation: 主语 the old lady 是单数，together with 不影响主谓一致。be seated 是系表结构，表示“坐着”，用 was seated。
common_mistake: 容易受grandchildren影响而误用were。

question: Cycling has become very popular in recent years. The highest speed ____ on a bicycle is 245 km/h.
explanation: recorded 是过去分词作后置定语，修饰 speed，表示“被记录的最高速度”。
common_mistake: 容易误用recording(现在分词/主动)。

question: On Feb.1, 2003 Space Shuttle Columbia broke apart during its return to Earth, ____ its seven crew members.
explanation: 现在分词 killing 作结果状语，表示“造成七名机组人员死亡”，表主动结果。
common_mistake: 容易误用killed(过去分词/被动)。

question: The man ____ a mask is said to be a famous model from France.
explanation: wearing a mask 是现在分词短语作后置定语，表示“戴着面具的那个男人”，表示主动。
common_mistake: 容易误用worn(过去分词/被动)。

question: He felt so sick that he left the meal ____, which made him feel even worse.
explanation: leave + 宾语 + 过去分词 表示“使……处于某种状态”。untouched 意为“未动的”，指饭菜没动。
common_mistake: 容易误用untouching。

question: ____ the parcel, he decided to go to the post office to see what was the matter.
explanation: Not having received 是现在分词完成式的否定，表示“没有收到包裹”发生在主句动作 decided 之前。
common_mistake: 容易将not放错位置（Having not received为错误语序）。

question: Although travelling by Maglev is expensive, this ____ railway has attracted many people in Shanghai in the ____ Chinese New Year.
explanation: newly-built 过去分词构成复合形容词，表示“新建的”；freezing 形容词表示“极冷的”。
common_mistake: 容易混淆freezing(极冷的)和frozen(冷冻的)。

question: Martin was so busy ____ the old that he gave up his part-time job.
explanation: be busy doing sth. 忙于做某事，用动名词 helping。
common_mistake: 容易在busy后误用不定式to help。

question: The workers are busy ____ windows to the new building these days.
explanation: be busy doing sth. 忙于做某事，用动名词 fixing。
common_mistake: 容易在busy后误用不定式to fix。

question: When she saw a group of students and teacher ____ bags of rubbish to the bins and cleaning the beach, the scientist was ____ joy.
explanation: see sb. doing 看见某人正在做某事，用 carrying；be filled with joy 充满喜悦，固定短语。
common_mistake: 容易混淆filled with和satisfied with的用法。

question: Plastic bags have caused serious environmental pollution, ___?
explanation: 反意疑问句。前句是肯定完成时，助动词为 have，主语 they 指代 plastic bags，故用 haven't they。
common_mistake: 学生易错选don't they，误以为cause是行为动词。此处caused是过去分词，have caused是现在完成时，助动词是have。

question: The little boy saved his classmates in the earthquake. ___ brave he was!
explanation: How + 形容词 + 主语 + 谓语！构成感叹句。How brave he was! 意为“他多勇敢啊！”
common_mistake: 学生易混淆What和How的感叹句结构。形容词+主语+谓语用How；What+(a/an)+形容词+名词+主语+谓语。

question: ___ exciting sport it is to climb the mountain!
explanation: What + (a/an) + 形容词 + 名词 + 主语 + 谓语！感叹句的 What 结构。exciting 以元音音素开头，用 What an。
common_mistake: 学生易忽略exciting以元音开头需用an；也容易与How混淆。名词后有主语谓语时用What。

question: ___ understanding your mother is!
explanation: How + 形容词 + 主语 + 谓语！感叹句。How understanding your mother is! 意为“你妈妈多么善解人意啊！”
common_mistake: 学生可能将understanding误认为名词而错选What。判断词性要看语境：此处understanding是形容词作表语。

question: They had their class meeting in the library instead of in the hall, ___?
explanation: had 在此是实义动词过去式，反意疑问句需借助助动词 did，前句肯定，用 didn't they。
common_mistake: 学生看到had易误以为是完成时态而错选hadn't they。注意had当"有"或助动词时才在反意疑问中复用。

question: Pollution problem is getting ___ in this city.
explanation: get 是系动词，后接形容词。比较级 more and more serious 表示“越来越严重”。
common_mistake: 学生易混淆serious（形容词）和seriously（副词），或记错比较级结构。get/be/become等系动词后接形容词。

question: You've spent an hour reading the novel. You should do your homework ___.
explanation: as soon as possible 尽快，固定短语。该做作业了尽快做。
common_mistake: 学生易错选as quick as possible。修饰动词do应用副词soon而非形容词quick。

question: — Do you like this kind of music? I don't like it. — ___.
explanation: Neither do I 表示“我也不喜欢”，用于上文为否定句且下文表示相同情况。
common_mistake: 学生易混淆So do I（肯定附和）和Neither do I（否定附和）。注意观察前句是肯定还是否定。

question: — ___ is it from here to the railway station? — About ten kilometres.
explanation: How far 提问距离，回答 About ten kilometres 表示距离。
common_mistake: 学生易混淆How far（距离）和How long（时间/长度）。答语是距离单位时用How far。

question: — ___ will the meeting ___? — In about 20 minutes.
explanation: How soon 提问“多久之后”，in about 20 minutes 表示大约20分钟后，用 end 表示会议结束。
common_mistake: 学生易选How long...last，但How long问持续时间，而答语是in+时间段（将来），应用How soon。

question: — ___ T-shirt do you like better, the red one or the blue one? — I prefer the red one.
explanation: Which 用于特定范围内的选择，Which T-shirt 问哪一件 T 恤。
common_mistake: 学生可能选How much或How many，但题干是限定范围的二选一，应该用Which。

question: — ___ do millions of online users visit the homepage of the government? — To read the news and search for the information they need.
explanation: 回答是 To read the news... 表示目的，提问原因用 Why。
common_mistake: 学生可能选What，但What问内容，此处答语表达的是目的，应用Why。

question: Your English teacher has never lost his temper, ___ he?
explanation: 反意疑问句，前有 never 表示否定，后句用肯定，助动词 has 与前面的 has lost 一致，用 has he。
common_mistake: 学生易忽略never的否定含义而选hasn't。含never/seldom/hardly等否定词时，附加疑问用肯定。

question: ___ wonderful concert they are putting on in the city square!
explanation: What a + 形容词 + 单数可数名词 + 主语 + 谓语！感叹句。wonderful 以辅音音素开头，用 What a。
common_mistake: 学生易与How混淆。有名词且可数单数时用What a/an；只有形容词时用How。

question: — ___ have you been in the sports club? — Since the first month I came to the school.
explanation: How long 提问多长时间，与 since 和 for 短语连用。回答 Since the first month... 表示时间段。
common_mistake: 学生可能选How soon，但How soon问将来多久之后，不用于完成时态。

question: The robot can help me sweep the floor. ___ smart invention it is!
explanation: What a + 形容词 + 名词 + 主语 + 谓语！感叹句。smart 以辅音音素开头，用 What a。
common_mistake: 学生易混淆What a和What an。smart以辅音开头，用a。

question: ___ important it is for kids to imagine freely!
explanation: How + 形容词 + 主语 + 谓语！感叹句。How important it is... 意为“那是多么重要啊！”
common_mistake: 学生可能将it is后的不定式结构误认为名词而错选What。关键是紧接在空后的词性——important是形容词。

question: Please ___ your exam papers once again before handing them in.
explanation: 祈使句以动词原形开头，Please go over... 表示“请检查”。
common_mistake: 学生可能受before handing影响选going over。Please后直接跟动词原形即可。

question: ___ wonderful speech Emma gave at the UN conference!
explanation: What a + 形容词 + 名词 + 主语 + 谓语！感叹句。wonderful speech 可数单数，用 What a。
common_mistake: 学生可能被gave迷惑以为用How。关键识别被感叹的名词speech。

question: — ___ Disney amusement parks are there in China? — Two.
explanation: How many 提问可数名词的数量，回答 Two 是数量。
common_mistake: 频率/时间疑问词（How often/How soon/How long）不对应数量答语。

question: — Do you know ___ a 5-day trip to Hong Kong costs? — I guess it's about ¥4,000.
explanation: how much 提问价格，costs 提示费用，回答约4000元。
common_mistake: 学生可能选how long，但how long问时间长度，此处问的是费用（cost + 金额）。

question: Professor Tu Youyou never stops doing research on Chinese medicine, ___?
explanation: stops 是实义动词第三人称单数，never 表示否定，反意疑问句用肯定的 does she。
common_mistake: 学生可能忽略never的否定含义选doesn't she；或误用is she。注意动词是stop（行为动词）不是be。

question: The self-driving plane proves to be useful in many ways. ___ smart invention it is!
explanation: What a smart invention it is! 感叹句，smart 辅音音素开头，用 What a。
common_mistake: 学生可能被proves等动词干扰。关键是看到后面的名词invention，用What a。

question: Please ___ the rubbish into different litter bins according to the signs.
explanation: 祈使句用动词原形，Please put... 表示“请投放”。
common_mistake: 学生可能受第三人称单数影响选puts。祈使句永远用动词原形。

question: Tell Harry the news when you see him, please. (改为否定句) ___ ___ Harry the news when you see him, please.
explanation: 祈使句否定用 Don't + 动词原形。Don't tell... 表示“不要告诉”。
common_mistake: 学生可能用Not tell或用错语序（Tell not）。祈使句否定统一用Don't+原形。

question: We keep in touch with each other by email. (改为否定句) We ___ ___ in touch with each other by email.
explanation: 一般现在时主语 We，否定用 don't keep。
common_mistake: 学生易选doesn't keep，忘记We不是第三人称单数。

question: Fred plans to work in the charity hospital in the community. (改为否定句) Fred ___ ___ to work in the charity hospital in the community.
explanation: 主语 Fred 第三人称单数，否定用 doesn't plan。
common_mistake: 学生可能在doesn't后仍用plans。doesn't后必须用动词原形。

question: Alan often does housework after school. (改为一般疑问句) ___ Alan often ___ housework after school?
explanation: does 是实义动词，主语 Alan 三单，用 Does 提问，后面接原形 do。
common_mistake: 学生可能在Does后仍用does（Does Alan does?）。Does后动词必须用原形。

question: They work on the farm with their parents every weekend. (改为一般疑问句) ___ they ___ on the farm with their parents every weekend?
explanation: 一般现在时主语 They，用 Do 提问，后接动词原形 work。
common_mistake: 学生可能误用Does（第三人称单数才用Does）。

question: Peter often helps in the house at the weekend. (改为一般疑问句) ___ Peter often ___ in the house at the weekend?
explanation: 主语 Peter 三单，用 Does 提问，后接动词原形 help。
common_mistake: 学生可能保留helps（Does Peter helps?），忘记了Does后必须用动词原形。

question: The new product consists of four main parts inside. (改为一般疑问句) ___ the new product ___ of four main parts inside?
explanation: 主语 the new product 三单，用 Does 提问，后接动词原形 consist。
common_mistake: 学生可能保留consists或误用Is。Does后动词用原形。

question: Let's take a picture in front of the fountain. (改为反意疑问句) Let's take a picture in front of the fountain, ___ ___?
explanation: Let's 开头的祈使句，反意疑问句固定用 shall we。
common_mistake: 学生易混淆Let's（包括对方，用shall we）和Let us（请求允许，用will you）。

question: Your mother has never tried shopping on the Internet. (改为反意疑问句) Your mother has never tried shopping on the Internet, ___ ___?
explanation: 前句有 never 表示否定，反意疑问句用肯定，助动词 has 对应完成时 has tried，用 has she。
common_mistake: 学生可能忽略never的否定含义选hasn't she。否定词后附加疑问用肯定。

question: Mr. and Mrs. Brown have already been to China twice. (对划线部分提问) ___ ___ times have Mr. and Mrs. Brown been to China?
explanation: times 是可数名词，提问次数用 How many。
common_mistake: 学生可能选How often（频率），但划线是具体次数twice，应问How many times。

question: The Shanghai International Arts Festival is held once a year. (对划线部分提问) ___ ___ is the Shanghai International Arts Festival held?
explanation: once a year 表示频率，提问频率用 How often。
common_mistake: 学生可能选How long或How many。频率用How often，时间段用How long。

question: We used to stay in a hotel by the sea on family holidays. (对划线部分提问) ___ ___ you use to stay on family holidays?
explanation: 划线部分是地点，用 Where 提问，used to 为过去，用助动词 did，Where did...。
common_mistake: 学生可能保留used（Where did you used to?）。did后动词用原形use。

question: Mr. Smith has taught in our school for three years. (对划线部分提问) ___ ___ has Mr. Smith taught in our school?
explanation: for three years 表示时间段，提问多长时间用 How long。
common_mistake: 学生可能选How often（频率），但for+时间段表持续，用How long。

question: Our school organizes an English speech contest once a year. (对划线部分提问) ___ ___ does your school organize an English speech contest?
explanation: once a year 表频率，提问频率用 How often。
common_mistake: 学生可能选How many（次数）或How long（时间长度）。频率副词用How often提问。

question: Susan followed Ben's advice to design smart shoes. (对划线部分提问) ___ advice ___ Susan follow to design smart shoes?
explanation: Ben's advice 表所属，用 Whose 提问；followed 过去式用 did，后接原形 follow。
common_mistake: 学生可能用Who提问（问人），但Ben's是所有格，问"谁的"用Whose。

question: Jim's office is four kilometers away from the nearest underground station. (对划线部分提问) ___ ___ is Jim's office from the nearest underground station?
explanation: four kilometers 表示距离，提问距离用 How far。
common_mistake: 学生可能选How long。How far问距离，How long问时间长度。

question: It is very convenient to travel by underground. (改为感叹句) ___ ___ it is to travel by underground!
explanation: How + 形容词 + 主语 + 谓语！感叹句。How convenient it is... 表示“多么方便啊！”
common_mistake: 学生可能用What感叹形容词。形容词+主语+谓语用How，不用What。

question: Yao Ming is an excellent Chinese basketball player. (改为感叹句) ___ ___ excellent Chinese basketball player Yao Ming is!
explanation: What an + 形容词 + 单数名词 + 主语 + 谓语！excellent 以元音音素开头，用 What an。
common_mistake: 学生可能忽略excellent元音开头而选What a。

question: The beach is a nice place for tourists. (改为感叹句) ___ ___ nice place the beach is for tourists!
explanation: What a + 形容词 + 单数名词 + 主语 + 谓语！nice 辅音音素开头，用 What a。
common_mistake: 学生可能用How（后无名词时用How）。

question: Our journey to Britain last summer was amazing. (改为感叹句) ___ ___ our journey to Britain last summer was!
explanation: How + 形容词 + 主语 + 谓语！感叹句。How amazing our journey was! 意为“我们的旅行多么奇妙啊！”
common_mistake: 学生可能选What amazing（缺名词）。形容词+主+谓用How。

question: Ben has finished the project on reusing natural resources. (改为否定句) Ben ___ ___ the project on reusing natural resources.
explanation: 现在完成时的否定，主语 Ben 三单，用 hasn't finished。
common_mistake: 学生可能用didn't finish（一般过去时）或haven't finished（主谓不一致）。

question: Amy will study in an international language school for several weeks. (对划线部分提问) ___ ___ will Amy study in an international language school?
explanation: for several weeks 时间段，用 How long 提问。
common_mistake: 学生可能选How often，但for+时间段表持续长度，不是频率。

question: Mary paid about $1,500 for a trip to Europe with her mother. (对划线部分提问) ___ ___ did Mary pay for a trip to Europe with her mother?
explanation: $1,500 是钱数，提问价格用 How much。
common_mistake: 学生可能选How many。how much问不可数数量或价格；how many问可数数量。

question: ___ doing, the students, in the lab, an experiment, are. (连词成句)
options: The students are doing an experiment in the lab.
The students doing are an experiment in the lab.
An experiment are doing the students in the lab.
In the lab the students are experiment doing.
explanation: 正确语序：主语 + be 动词 + 现在分词 + 宾语 + 地点状语。The students are doing an experiment in the lab.
common_mistake: 英语陈述句基本语序为SVO，状语通常后置。学生可能把地点状语放在错误位置。

question: ___ the amusement park, after, are going to, they, the speech contest. (连词成句)
options: They are going to the amusement park after the speech contest.
The amusement park they are going to after the speech contest.
After the amusement park they are going to the speech contest.
To the speech contest they are going after the amusement park.
explanation: 正确语序：主语 + be going to + 地点 + 时间状语。
common_mistake: 时间状语after...通常放在句末。学生可能错乱安排状语位置。

question: George wants to be a tour guide at the Bund for foreign visitors. (改为一般疑问句) ___ George ___ to be a tour guide at the Bund for foreign visitors?
explanation: 主语 George 三单，用 Does 提问，后接动词原形 want。
common_mistake: 学生可能保留wants（Does George wants?）。Does后必须用动词原形。

question: The Chinese graduate became a star because of his speech at Harvard. (对划线部分提问) ___ ___ the Chinese graduate become a star?
explanation: because of his speech 表原因，用 Why 提问；became 过去式，用 did 助动词。
common_mistake: 学生可能选How did（问方式）。because of明确表示原因，应用Why。

question: The invention of smart phones changed the world in many ways. (改为一般疑问句) ___ the invention of smart phones ___ the world in many ways?
explanation: changed 是过去式，一般疑问句用 Did 提问，后接原形 change。
common_mistake: 学生可能用Was change或保留changed。一般过去时疑问句用Did+原形。

question: That amusement park has lots of tourists during the holiday. (对划线部分提问) ___ ___ that amusement park have lots of tourists?
explanation: during the holiday 表时间，用 When 提问；has 是实义动词三单，用 does 助动词。
common_mistake: 学生可能选Why（问原因）或How（问方式）。during是时间介词，用When。

question: Shared-bikes are very popular in some big cities. (改为感叹句) ___ ___ shared-bikes are in some big cities!
explanation: How + 形容词 + 主语 + 谓语！感叹句。How popular shared-bikes are! 表示“共享单车多受欢迎啊！”
common_mistake: 学生可能用What popular（缺少名词）。形容词在前用How不用What。

question: John went to church with his brother last Sunday morning. (改为否定句) John ___ ___ to church with his brother last Sunday morning.
explanation: went 是过去式，否定用 didn't go。
common_mistake: 学生可能用doesn't go（忘记是过去时）或not went（语法错误）。

question: Grace does online shopping four times a month. (对划线部分提问) ___ ___ does Grace do online shopping?
explanation: four times a month 频率，用 How often 提问。
common_mistake: 学生可能选How many times（虽然也通但不如How often地道）。教材标准用How often。

question: ___ are good for, fruits and vegetables, to keep fit, people, fresh. (连词成句)
options: Fresh fruits and vegetables are good for people to keep fit.
Fruits and vegetables fresh are good for people to keep fit.
Fresh fruits and vegetables good are for people to keep fit.
People are good for fresh fruits and vegetables to keep fit.
explanation: 正确语序：形容词 Fresh + 主语 + be 动词 + 表语 + for...。
common_mistake: 学生可能把fresh放在错误位置。单个形容词作定语一般前置。

question: ___ enables, various information, the Internet, to collect, teenagers. (连词成句)
options: The Internet enables teenagers to collect various information.
Teenagers enables the Internet to collect various information.
Various information enables teenagers to collect the Internet.
To collect the Internet enables teenagers various information.
explanation: 正确语序：主语 + enables + 宾语 + to do + 宾语。
common_mistake: 学生可能混淆主语和宾语的位置。The Internet是动作的发出者（主语）。

question: ___ many ways, for us, are, to keep in touch, there. (连词成句)
options: There are many ways for us to keep in touch.
There many ways are for us to keep in touch.
For us there are many ways to keep in touch.
Many ways there are for us to keep in touch.
explanation: There be 句型，顺序：There are + 主语 + for us to do。
common_mistake: 学生可能颠倒语序。There be句型中，be动词紧跟There，主语在后。

question: I really want to know ___ you are getting on with your work.
explanation: 宾语从句，how 表示“进展如何”，how you are getting on with... 意为“你的工作进展如何”。
common_mistake: 学生可能选that，但that在宾语从句中不表达疑问语气。want to know后接疑问词引导的宾语从句。

question: Do you know ___?
options: when will the Beijing Olympic Games begin
when the Beijing Olympic Games will begin
when would the Beijing Olympic Games begin
when the Beijing Olympic Games would begin
explanation: 宾语从句用陈述语序，即引导词 + 主语 + 谓语。when the Beijing Olympic Games will begin 正确。
common_mistake: 学生易用疑问语序（when will...）。宾语从句必须用陈述语序。

question: I want to know ___.
options: when we should arrive at the airport
when should we arrive at the airport
when the airport we should arrive at
when the airport should we arrive at
explanation: 宾语从句陈述语序，when we should arrive at the airport 正确。
common_mistake: 学生可能被arrive at的介词at迷惑。at是介词，不是宾语从句的一部分。

question: Miss Li wants to know ___ next week.
explanation: 根据语境，Miss Li 想知道地点，用 where 引导，陈述语序 where my uncle will stay。
common_mistake: 注意：选项0 "when will my uncle leave" 语序错误（疑问语序），应该是陈述语序 "when my uncle will leave"。宾语从句中，疑问词后接主语+谓语，不要倒装。

question: Professor Nelson wanted to know ___.
explanation: 主句 wanted 过去时，从句用过去将来时，陈述语序 when the conference would begin。
common_mistake: 学生可能忽略时态呼应（主过从过），选will begin。

question: My little cousin, Sandy, always asks ___.
options: why does rain come from the sky
that rain comes from the sky
explanation: 宾语从句用陈述语序，where rain comes from 意为“雨从哪里来”。
common_mistake: 学生易选where does rain come from（疑问语序）。宾语从句必须陈述语序。

question: The teacher turned to the students and asked tenderly what nice things ___.
explanation: 宾语从句用陈述语序，主句 asked 过去时，从句用 they could do。
common_mistake: 学生可能选could they do（疑问语序）或they can do（忽略时态呼应）。

question: We all wanted to know ___ so many English words.
options: if the five-year-old boy could spell
that the five-year-old boy could spell
what could the five-year-old boy spell
why the five-year-old boy can spell
explanation: wanted to know 想知道是否，用 if 引导宾语从句，过去时用 could spell。
common_mistake: 学生可能选that（that不表示疑问语气）。wanted to know后用if/whether或疑问词。

question: Jenny told me that she ___ an English Speech Contest the next month.
explanation: 主句 told 过去时，从句 the next month 表示将来的将来，用过去将来时 would take part in。
common_mistake: 学生可能忽略时态呼应选will take（但选项无will），或用took（过去式不表将来）。

question: "Is it the first boys-only school in the city?" asked a parent. (改为宾语从句) A parent asked ___ it ___ the first boys-only school in the city.
explanation: 一般疑问句变宾语从句，用 whether/if 引导，时态由 is 变 was。
common_mistake: 学生可能用that引导（一般疑问句转宾语从句用whether/if）。

question: "Who is responsible for the food safety problem?" asked the reporter. (改为宾语从句) The reporter asked ___ ___ responsible for the food safety problem.
explanation: 特殊疑问句变宾语从句，语序不变，is 变为 was。
common_mistake: 学生可能保留is（忽略时态呼应）或用whom（who在从句中作主语，用主格）。

question: Are there any new markets in Asia? The sales manager wants to know. (合并为一句) The sales manager wants to know ___ there ___ any new markets in Asia.
explanation: 一般疑问句变宾语从句，用 whether/if，主句 wants 现在时，从句时态不变用 are。
common_mistake: 学生可能用that引导。一般疑问句转宾语从句必须用whether/if。

question: John asked, "Can you look after my pet dog while I'm away?" (改为宾语从句) John asked ___ I ___ look after his pet dog while he was away.
explanation: 一般疑问句变宾语从句，用 whether/if，主句 asked 过去时，can 变 could。
common_mistake: 学生可能保留can（忽略时态呼应）。一般疑问句转宾语从句用whether/if。

question: "Why does Jim send flowers to Ms Grey every September?" he wondered. (改为宾语从句) He wondered why ___ ___ flowers to Ms Grey every September.
explanation: 特殊疑问句变宾语从句，语序不变，主句 wondered 过去时，从句 sends 变 sent。
common_mistake: 学生可能保留sends或疑问语序。宾语从句陈述语序+时态呼应。

question: "When will you finish the project on Internet safety?" the official asked. (改为宾语从句) The official asked ___ I ___ finish the project on Internet safety.
explanation: 特殊疑问句变宾语从句，用 when 引导，主句 asked 过去时，will 变 would。
common_mistake: 学生可能保留will或选that。保留原疑问词，并做时态呼应。

question: "Have you ever been in a hot air balloon?" Melissa asked her mom. (改为宾语从句) Melissa asked her mom ___ she ___ ever been in a hot air balloon.
explanation: 一般疑问句变宾语从句，用 if/whether；主句 asked 过去时，现在完成时 has been 变 had been。
common_mistake: 学生可能保留has或选that。注意时态从现在完成时变为过去完成时。

question: "How are you getting along with your new roommate?" Franklin asked me. (改为宾语从句) Franklin asked me ___ ___ was getting along with my new roommate.
explanation: 特殊疑问句变宾语从句，用 how 引导，主语 you 变为 I，时态 are 变 was。
common_mistake: 学生可能用how me（代词用错）。宾语从句中主语用主格I。

question: The nurse won't leave her patients ___ she's sure they are all taken good care of.
explanation: unless 表示“除非”，相当于 if not，符合“除非她确信病人被照顾好，否则不会离开”的语境。
common_mistake: 学生可能选if，但if表示"如果"，逻辑相反。won't...unless = 不会……除非……

question: The two companies decided to work together ___ they had common interest.
explanation: because 引导原因状语从句，解释合作的原因是拥有共同利益。
common_mistake: 学生可能选unless（除非），逻辑不通。因果关系用because。

question: Mr. Black walked around and offered help ___ we were doing an experiment.
explanation: while 引导时间状语从句，表示“当……的时候”，动作持续进行。
common_mistake: 学生可能选until（直到），逻辑不通。while强调同时性。

question: I'm going to make an early start in order not to miss the train. (保持句意不变) I'm going to make an early start ___ ___ I won't miss the train.
explanation: so that 引导目的状语从句，表示“以便”，相当于 in order that。
common_mistake: 学生可能选because（原因）。in order to/not to表目的，等同于so that。

question: The messenger left after he gave the letter to Mr. Li. (保持句意不变) The messenger ___ leave ___ he gave the letter to Mr. Li.
explanation: not...until 句式：didn't leave until... 表示“直到……才离开”。
common_mistake: 学生可能选did, before。after转not...until更符合英语表达习惯。

question: I will call the police if you don't stop making the noise immediately. (保持句意不变) I will call the police ___ you ___ making the noise immediately.
explanation: unless = if...not，后面直接加肯定式 stop。
common_mistake: 学生可能选unless, don't stop（双重否定错误）。unless已含否定含义，后接肯定。

question: Visitors love this city because of its historical sights and delicious food. (保持句意不变) Visitors love this city ___ it ___ historical sights and delicious food.
explanation: because of + 名词 变为 because + 从句，用 has。
common_mistake: 学生可能用so（因果倒置）或although（让步）。because of转because从句。

question: The doctors tried their best to save the patient's life, but failed. (保持句意不变) The doctors failed ___ save the patient's life ___ they ___ their best.
explanation: failed to do 未能做；although 引导让步状语从句；用 did 代替 tried。
common_mistake: 学生可能用tried（did their best中did是代动词，避免重复）。

question: This year's car exhibition was very special. It attracted many visitors. (合并为一句) This year's car exhibition was ___ special ___ it attracted many visitors.
explanation: so...that 句型，如此……以至于。
common_mistake: 学生可能选such...that（such后接名词）。special是形容词，用so。

question: Keep working hard, and you will achieve success. (保持句意不变) ___ ___ keep working hard, you will achieve success.
explanation: 祈使句 + and 等同于 If you... 条件句。
common_mistake: 学生可能选Unless（除非），逻辑相反。祈使句+and等同于If条件句。

question: "Better late than never," said the teacher to the boy ___ was behind with his homework.
explanation: 定语从句先行词 the boy 指人，引导词可用 who/that，此处 that 正确。
common_mistake: 学生可能选whom（宾语格）或/（省略，但作主语的关系代词不可省略）。

question: Which of these trains is the one ___ goes to Manchester?
explanation: 定语从句先行词 the one 指代 train，用 that 引导。
common_mistake: 学生可能选/（省略），但关系代词在从句中作主语时不可省略。

question: He felt so sick that he left the meal untouched, ___ made him feel even worse.
explanation: which 引导非限制性定语从句，指代前面整个主句，意为“这件事”。
common_mistake: 学生可能选that。非限制性定语从句不能用that引导。

question: The car exhibition will take place ___ a fashion show was successfully held last month.
explanation: 定语从句修饰地点，where 作状语，表示“在那个地方”。
common_mistake: 学生可能选which（which作主语或宾语，但从句不缺成分）。where作状语。

question: The Opera House ___ you are looking for is just opposite the Museum on Green Street.
explanation: 定语从句，先行词 Opera House 是 look for 的宾语，用 which/that。
common_mistake: 学生可能选where（但look for缺宾语，需用关系代词which/that）。where只能作状语。

question: He met the friend of his ___ he had not seen for three years yesterday.
explanation: 定语从句中，seen 是及物动词，缺少宾语，先行词指人，用 whom 作宾语。
common_mistake: 学生可能选who（主格）。关系代词作宾语时用whom（正式）或who/that（非正式）。本题选whom。

question: Give this prize to anyone ___ composition is thought excellent.
explanation: whose composition 表示“任何人的作文”，whose 在定语从句中作定语。
common_mistake: 学生可能选who（who后应接谓语，不能直接接名词）。whose + 名词 = 关系代词所有格。

question: I'll never forget the days ___ I settled down in the countryside.
explanation: 定语从句先行词 the days 指时间，用 when 引导。
common_mistake: 学生可能选which（但从句不缺主语/宾语，需要时间状语）。

question: The boy student didn't tell the reason ___ he was late for class this morning.
explanation: 定语从句，先行词 reason，用 why 引导，表示原因。
common_mistake: 学生可能选that。reason后可用why或that，但why专门表示原因，更准确。

question: Mr. Williams received a complaint from a customer ___ was unhappy with the goods.
explanation: 定语从句先行词 customer 指人，可用 who/that，此处 that 可选。
common_mistake: 学生可能选which（指物）。指人且在从句中作主语用who/that。

question: — Have a good day, Frank! — ___
explanation: Have a good day 是祝福语，回应可用 Thank you 或 You too / The same to you。选项 A The same to you 也是常见回应。
common_mistake: 学生可能选Thank you。别人说Have a good day，回应也要表达祝福。

question: — Would you like me to bring you a cup of coffee? — ___
explanation: Would you like me to... 是提议，肯定回答用 Yes, please. 表示“好的，请”。
common_mistake: 学生可能选Yes, I'd like to（用于回应Would you like to...邀请，不用于接受他人服务）。

question: — How about raising some money for the charity? — ___
explanation: How about... 提建议，回答 Good idea. 表示赞成。
common_mistake: 学生可能选Enjoy yourself（玩得开心），与语境不符。

question: — You've done a great job, Grace. — ___
explanation: 对夸奖的回答用感谢，Thanks a lot. 正确。
common_mistake: 学生受中文习惯影响可能选I'm afraid not.。英语中被夸奖应表示感谢。

question: — I'm really sorry to have broken your coffee cup. — ___
explanation: 对道歉的回答用 That's all right. 表示“没关系”。
common_mistake: 学生可能选You are welcome（回应感谢）。道歉的回应用That's all right等。

question: — Sharon, remember to lock the door before leaving the house. — ___
explanation: 对于提醒/祈使句的回应，OK. I will. 表示“好的，我会的”。
common_mistake: 学生可能选Yes, please。Yes, please用于主动提供的服务，不是回应要求。

question: — Do you know Mr. Lin's telephone number? — ___ He didn't tell me, but I know his address.
explanation: 不知道他人的电话号码，常用 Sorry. 来回应。
common_mistake: 学生可能选I know（但后面说没告诉电话号码，矛盾）。表示不知道先说Sorry。

question: — Don't be late, please. I hate waiting for people. — ___
explanation: Me too. 表示“我也是”，同意对方不喜欢等人的说法。
common_mistake: 学生可能选So do I（用于附和"我也是"，但Me too更口语化，这里选Me too）。

question: — Would you mind telling me where he lives recently? — ___
explanation: Would you mind...? 回答不介意用 Not at all. 或 Of course not. Not at all. 正确。
common_mistake: 学生可能选Of course（意思是"当然介意"，与"不介意"相反）。mind的问句否定回答用Not at all。

question: — Peter, you've made a few mistakes in the maths test. — ___, sir.
explanation: 被告知犯了错，用 I'm sorry 回应。
common_mistake: 学生可能选Excuse me（事前打扰用）。被指出错误后应用I'm sorry。

question: — I think honesty is the most important thing in doing everything. — ___
explanation: 同意对方观点，用 I think so, too. 表示“我也这么认为”。
common_mistake: 学生可能选All right（表示同意做某事，不是同意观点）。

question: — I'm leaving for Canada on a study trip next week. — ___
explanation: 对方要出行，祝愿愉快，用 Enjoy your time. 正确。
common_mistake: 学生可能选That's all right（回应道歉）或You're welcome（回应感谢）。

question: — Shall we join in the Green World Summer Camp? — ___
explanation: Shall we... 提建议，回答 Good idea. 表示好主意。
common_mistake: 学生可能选You're welcome（回应感谢）。建议的回应用Good idea/That sounds great等。

question: — Congratulations! You've got a chance to be an exchange student! — ___
explanation: 对祝贺的回答用感谢，Thank you. 正确。
common_mistake: 学生在中文影响下可能过度谦虚。英语中接受祝贺直接说Thank you。

question: — Tim and I will visit the exhibition this weekend. Would you like to join us? — ___
explanation: 邀请的肯定回答用 I'd love to. 表示愿意。
common_mistake: 学生可能选Well done（夸奖）或You're welcome（回应感谢）。

question: — We'll study in different schools next term. Enjoy your time in the new school! — ___
explanation: 当对方对你说 Enjoy... 时，可以用 The same to you. 回祝。
common_mistake: 学生可能选Me too（我也是），但不适合回应祝福。

question: — Remember to print on both sides of the paper. — ___
explanation: 对于提醒，回答 Sure. I will. 表示“好的，我会的”。
common_mistake: 学生可能选Well done（夸奖）或Me, too（我也是）。

question: — I was just in time to get there for the meeting. Thank you for lending me the bike. — ___
explanation: 对道谢的回答用 You're welcome. 不用谢。
common_mistake: 学生可能选That's right（你说得对）或Of course not（当然不）。

question: — Mum, ___ I visit the Movie Museum tomorrow? — I'm afraid you can't. It is closed on Monday.
explanation: May I...? 请求许可，比 Can I...? 更正式，答语 can't 对应 may。
common_mistake: 学生可能选must（必须）。请求许可用may/can，must语气太强硬。

question: — Don't throw plastic bags towards the animals in the zoo. — ___
explanation: 对禁止/劝告的回应，All right. 表示“好的，知道了”。
common_mistake: 学生可能选My pleasure（回应感谢）。回应要求用All right./OK.等。

question: — You look sad, Betty. What's the matter with you? — ___
options: I don't quite agree with you.
explanation: What's the matter? 询问出了什么事，应回答不好的状况。I can't attend the summer... 表达缺席，符合。
common_mistake: 学生可能选I've got the first prize（得奖应该开心，不会sad）。

question: — Excuse me, where is the Moonlight Hotel? — ___ I'm a stranger myself.
explanation: 对方问路自己不知道，用 Sorry, I don't know. 委婉拒绝。
common_mistake: 学生可能选Thank you all the same（用于对方无法帮忙时的回应）。

question: — The Art Festival is coming. We're going to watch the play Twelfth Night. — ___
explanation: 知道对方要去看剧，用 Enjoy your time. 祝好。
common_mistake: 学生可能选That's all right（回应道歉）。分享计划时回应祝福。

question: — Would you like to join me in making cakes tomorrow? — ___
explanation: 对邀请的肯定回答，I'd love to. 表示乐意。
common_mistake: 学生可能选You're welcome（回应感谢）。邀请的接受用I'd love to。

question: — ___ — Congratulations!
options: I was awarded first prize in the writing
Why not take the underground to the university?
explanation: 因为对方说 Congratulations!，说明上文是获奖的好消息，C 选项符合。
common_mistake: 学生可能选其他选项，但它们都不对应Congratulations的回应。

question: — I'm awfully sorry for bringing you so much trouble. — ___
explanation: 对道歉的回答，Never mind. 表示“没关系、别在意”。
common_mistake: 学生可能选You are welcome（回应感谢）。道歉用Never mind/That's all right/It doesn't matter。

question: — ___ — That's a good idea.
options: I've got the first prize in the English speech contest.
I'd like to invite you to my birthday party tomorrow.
Shall we go to the farm to pick peaches this weekend?
Would you mind opening the window a bit more?
explanation: That's a good idea. 常用来回应提议，C 是提建议。
common_mistake: 学生可能选其他选项，但它们都得不到That's a good idea的回应。

question: There are many ___ in the park.
explanation: child 的复数是不规则变化 children。many 后接可数名词复数。
common_mistake: 不规则名词复数要单独记忆。child→children，man→men，woman→women。

question: I need to buy two ___ of bread.
explanation: loaf 的复数形式是 loaves。two loaves of bread 两条面包。
common_mistake: 以 f/fe 结尾的名词变复数，常改 f 为 v 加 es。

question: How ___ milk do we need?
explanation: milk 是不可数名词，用 How much 提问数量。
common_mistake: 看名词是可数还是不可数，再选修饰词。much+不可数，many+可数。

question: Please give ___ the book.
explanation: give 后接双宾语，指人的间接宾语用宾格 me。
common_mistake: 动词/介词后用宾格，不用主格。

question: ___ is a student. ___ name is Tom.
explanation: 第一个空作主语用主格 He，第二个空修饰 name 用物主代词 His。
common_mistake: 主格作主语，形物代后面必须跟名词。

question: I have ___ to tell you.
explanation: 形容词修饰不定代词需要后置，something important 正确。肯定句用 something。
common_mistake: something+形容词（后置）。否定句/疑问句用 anything。

question: There isn't ___ in the room.
explanation: 否定句、疑问句用 anybody，肯定句用 somebody。There isn't anybody 正确。
common_mistake: 否定句中用 any- 系列词。some- 用于肯定句。

question: My father ___ TV every evening.
explanation: every evening 一般现在时，主语 My father 三单，动词用 watches。
common_mistake: 第三人称单数：动词+s/es。以 ch/sh/s/x/o 结尾加 -es。

question: Light ___ faster than sound.
explanation: 客观真理用一般现在时，主语 Light 三单，用 travels。
common_mistake: 客观真理永远用一般现在时，不受主句时态影响。

question: She ___ her homework an hour ago.
explanation: an hour ago 是过去时间，用一般过去时 finished。
common_mistake: ago 明确表示过去，必须用过去时。

question: They ___ to Paris last summer.
explanation: last summer 过去时间，用一般过去时 went。
common_mistake: 不规则动词过去式要单独记忆：go→went, see→saw, eat→ate。

question: I think she ___ the exam.
explanation: 表示将来，用 will pass。
common_mistake: will 后永远跟动词原形。

question: Look at the clouds! It ___.
explanation: 根据迹象（看云）判断即将下雨，用 be going to rain。
common_mistake: 有迹象的推测用 going to，临时决定用 will。

question: I ___ this movie twice.
explanation: twice 表示次数，强调到现在为止的经历，用现在完成时 have seen。
common_mistake: 表示经历/次数常用现在完成时。

question: He ___ already ___ his homework.
explanation: already 提示现在完成时 has done，He 三单用 has，后接过去分词 finished。
common_mistake: already, yet, just, ever, never 常与现在完成时搭配。

question: This book is ___ than that one.
explanation: than 提示比较级，interesting 多音节词，比较级加 more。
common_mistake: 多音节词比较级=more+形容词，最高级=most+形容词。

question: She is the ___ student in our class.
explanation: the + 最高级，good 的最高级是 best。in our class 表范围。
common_mistake: 最高级前要加 the。good→better→best。

question: My birthday is ___ June 15th.
explanation: 具体日期前用介词 on。
common_mistake: 具体日期用 on，月份/年份用 in。

question: The cat is sleeping ___ the sofa.
explanation: on the sofa 在沙发表面上，用 on。
common_mistake: on 表面接触，in 在里面，under 在下面。

question: ___ you ___ he is wrong.
explanation: neither...nor... 表示“你和他在都不对”，谓语与 nor 后的主语 he 一致，用 is。
common_mistake: neither...nor...：两者都不，就近原则。

question: ___ it was raining, we went out.
explanation: although 表示“虽然”，尽管下雨我们还是出去了。
common_mistake: although 和 but 不能同时用。

question: Would you mind ___ the window?
explanation: mind doing sth. 介意做某事，用动名词 opening。
common_mistake: mind + doing。类似：enjoy, finish, practice, suggest + doing。

question: My mother asked me ___ the room.
explanation: ask sb. to do sth. 让某人做某事，用不定式 to clean。
common_mistake: ask/tell/want sb to do sth。let/make/have sb do sth(不带to)。

question: You ___ be tired after working all day.
explanation: must 表示有把握的推测“一定”。工作一整天一定累了。
common_mistake: must 肯定推测（一定），can't 否定推测（不可能）。

question: You ___ park here. It's a no-parking zone.
explanation: mustn't 表示“禁止”，根据标志不准停车。can't 也可，但 mustn't 更强调规定。题目选 A。
common_mistake: mustn't = 禁止（不允许），needn't = 不必。

question: The windows ___ every month.
explanation: 被动语态，窗户被擦，every month 一般现在时，用 are cleaned。
common_mistake: 被动语态=be+过去分词。判断主被动关系。

question: This building ___ in 2000.
explanation: in 2000 过去时间，建筑物被建造，用一般过去时被动语态 was built。
common_mistake: 过去时被动=was/were+过去分词。

question: He is ___ honest man.
explanation: honest 以元音音素开头，不定冠词用 an。
common_mistake: a/an 看发音不看字母。an hour, an honest man。

question: ___ sun rises in the east.
explanation: 独一无二的事物前用定冠词 the。
common_mistake: 独一无二的事物前用 the：the sun, the moon, the earth。

question: Do you know ___?
explanation: 宾语从句用陈述语序，where he lives 正确。
common_mistake: 宾语从句语序是疑问词+主语+谓语，不要用疑问语序。

question: This is the house ___ I was born.
explanation: 定语从句，先行词 house 是地点，在从句中作状语，用 where。
common_mistake: 地点用 where，时间用 when，原因用 why。

question: ___ you work hard, you will succeed.
explanation: if 引导条件状语从句，如果努力工作就会成功。
common_mistake: if 条件句用现在时表将来，主句用 will。

question: I like playing ___ football, but my sister likes playing ___ piano.
explanation: 球类运动前不加冠词（play football）；乐器前必须加定冠词 the（play the piano）。
common_mistake: 球类前不加冠词，乐器前必加 the。

question: Let's go to ___ cinema tonight.
explanation: go to the cinema 是固定搭配，意为“去看电影”，要用定冠词 the。
common_mistake: go to the cinema/hospital 用 the；go to school/bed 不加冠词。

question: ___ Yellow River is the second longest river in China.
explanation: 江河、海洋等专有名词前必须加定冠词 the。The Yellow River 黄河。
common_mistake: 江河、海洋、山脉、群岛前加 the。

question: The little boy can dress ___ now.
explanation: dress oneself 意为“自己穿衣服”。主语 the little boy 是男性单数，反身代词用 himself。
common_mistake: 反身代词与主语的人称和数保持一致。

question: We enjoyed ___ at the beach yesterday.
explanation: enjoy oneself 意为“玩得开心”。主语 We 对应的反身代词是 ourselves。
common_mistake: enjoy 后缺宾语时加反身代词。

question: Help ___ to some cake, children.
explanation: help oneself 意为“请自便”。children 是复数，反身代词用 yourselves。
common_mistake: 注意单复数：yourself（单）, yourselves（复）。

question: Is there ___ wrong with your computer?
explanation: 疑问句和否定句中通常用 anything，表示“任何问题”。肯定句用 something。
common_mistake: anything 用于否定和疑问，something 用于肯定。

question: The box is empty. There is ___ in it.
explanation: 盒子是空的，里面什么也没有，用 nothing 表示“没有东西”。
common_mistake: nothing=什么也没有。not anything=nothing。

question: ___ is waiting for you at the gate.
explanation: 肯定句表示“有人在等你”，用 Someone。Anyone 用于疑问句/否定句。
common_mistake: someone/somebody 用于肯定句，anyone/anybody 用于疑问否定。

question: The girl sings ___. We all like her voice.
explanation: 修饰动词 sings 需用副词 beautifully。beautiful 是形容词，不能修饰动词。
common_mistake: beautiful→beautifully，形容词+ly→副词。

question: He is a ___ worker. He works ___.
explanation: 第一空修饰名词 worker 用形容词 careful；第二空修饰动词 works 用副词 carefully。
common_mistake: 形容词修饰名词，副词修饰动词/形容词/副词。

question: Please speak ___. The baby is sleeping.
explanation: 说话要用副词 quietly 修饰 speak，表示“安静地说话”，因为婴儿在睡觉。
common_mistake: 形容词+ly→副词。quiet→quietly。

question: There is a bird ___ the tree.
explanation: 鸟停留在树里，用 in the tree。on the tree 通常指长在树上的果实等。
common_mistake: 外来物在树上用 in，树上长的用 on。

question: Shanghai is ___ the east of China.
explanation: 上海在中国境内东部，表示在范围之内，用介词 in。
common_mistake: in=范围内，on=接壤，to=不相邻。

question: Japan is ___ the east of China.
explanation: 日本在中国境外东部，表示在范围之外且接壤或不接壤，用介词 to。
common_mistake: to 表示不在同一范围且不相邻的方向。

question: ___ Tom ___ Mary likes swimming. They both go to the pool every weekend.
explanation: Both...and 连接并列主语时谓语用复数。题干中 likes 应为 like，但选项 Both...and 是唯一符合句意的答案。注意主谓一致问题。
common_mistake: both...and... 谓语用复数。

question: Hurry up, ___ you'll miss the bus.
explanation: 祈使句 + or 表示“否则、要不然”，意为“快点，否则你会错过公交车”。
common_mistake: 祈使句+or+陈述句 = 否则会...。

question: He is very tired, ___ he keeps working.
explanation: 前后分句是转折关系，用 but 表示“但是”。
common_mistake: but 连接两个相反意思的句子。

question: I didn't go to the party ___ I was ill.
explanation: because 引导原因状语从句，解释没去聚会的原因。
common_mistake: because 和 so 不能同时用。

question: ___ you don't hurry, you'll be late.
explanation: if 引导条件状语从句，表示“如果不快点，就会迟到”。主句一般将来时，从句用一般现在时。
common_mistake: if 条件句从句用现在时，主句用将来时。

question: I'll wait ___ he comes back.
explanation: until 表示“直到……为止”，我会一直等到他回来。
common_mistake: until 引导的时间状语从句用现在时代替将来时。

question: It's important ___ English every day.
explanation: It is + adj. + to do sth. 句型，意为“做某事是……的”。to practice 是真正的主语。
common_mistake: it 作形式主语，真正主语是不定式 to do。

question: Let me ___ you carry the box.
explanation: let sb. do sth. 结构，意为“让某人做某事”，用不带 to 的不定式 help。
common_mistake: let/make/have sb do sth 使用不带 to 的不定式。

question: He decided ___ abroad for further study.
explanation: decide to do sth. 决定做某事，后接不定式。
common_mistake: decide/want/hope/plan + to do。

question: I don't know ___ he will come or not.
explanation: whether...or not 表示“是否”，引导宾语从句。whether 可用于介词后或与 or not 连用，而 if 则不能这样用。
common_mistake: whether/if 引导宾语从句表示"是否"。weather 是天气。

question: She asked me ___ I had been to Beijing.
explanation: if 在此引导宾语从句，意为“是否”，相当于 whether。
common_mistake: if/whether 引导一般疑问意义的宾语从句。

question: Can you tell me ___ the meeting starts?
explanation: when 引导宾语从句，询问会议开始的时间。
common_mistake: 特殊疑问词引导的宾语从句：疑问词+主语+谓语。

question: The movie ___ we saw last night was very exciting.
explanation: 定语从句先行词 movie 指物，关系代词用 which 在从句中作宾语。
common_mistake: 物用 which/that，人用 who/that。

question: Do you know the girl ___ is dancing over there?
explanation: 定语从句先行词 girl 指人，关系代词用 who 在从句中作主语。
common_mistake: 人用 who/that 引导定语从句。

question: This is the school ___ I studied three years ago.
explanation: 定语从句先行词 school 是地点，关系副词用 where，在从句中作地点状语。
common_mistake: 先行词在从句中作地点状语用 where，作主语/宾语用 which/that。

question: There are ___ students in our class, twenty boys and eighteen girls.
explanation: 数字38的正确英文写法是 thirty-eight，中间有连字符。
common_mistake: 几十几：十位-个位。21=twenty-one, 38=thirty-eight。

question: ___ of the students in our school are girls.
explanation: 三分之二的表达为 two thirds，分子大于1时分母 third 要加 s。
common_mistake: 分数表达：分子=基数词，分母=序数词，分子>1分母+s。

question: He lives on the ___ floor.
explanation: 十二楼的序数词是 twelfth，twelve 的序数词变化为 twelfth。
common_mistake: twelve→twelfth（ve→fth）。二十以上的序数词只变个位。

question: Monday is the ___ day of the week.
explanation: 星期一是一周的第二天，用序数词 second。
common_mistake: 序数词表示顺序。第一=first, 第二=second, 第三=third。

question: We usually have lunch at ___ past eleven.
explanation: half past eleven 表示“十一点半”，是时间表达。
common_mistake: 时间表达：half past=...点半，quarter past=...点一刻。

question: The meeting will be held on ___.
explanation: 具体日期表达可用 July 5th 或 July 5，选项中 July 5th 为规范写法。
common_mistake: 英式：the fifth of July。美式：July fifth / July 5th。

question: ___ is National Day in China.
explanation: 中国国庆节是十月一日，表达为 October 1st 或 October 1。
common_mistake: 月份首字母大写：January, February, March...

question: He was ___ tired ___ he fell asleep immediately.
explanation: so + 形容词/副词 + that 从句，表示“如此……以至于”。
common_mistake: so...that 中间是形容词/副词，such...that 中间是名词。

question: It is ___ a hard problem ___ nobody can solve it.
explanation: such a + 形容词 + 名词 + that 从句，表示“如此……以至于”。注意 so 后接形容词或副词，such 后接名词短语。
common_mistake: such+a/an+adj+n+that。so+adj+a/an+n+that。

question: The police ___ already arrived at the scene of the accident.
explanation: police 是集体名词，作复数看待，谓语用复数。现在完成时用 have arrived。
common_mistake: police 永远用复数动词！

question: His family ___ watching TV together in the living room.
explanation: family 在此指家庭成员，强调个体，谓语动词用复数 are。
common_mistake: family 整体单数/成员复数。

question: The climate of Kunming is much better than ___ of Shanghai.
explanation: that 用来指代前面出现过的不可数名词 the climate，以避免重复。
common_mistake: 比较结构中 that/those 代替名词避免重复。

question: — ___ do you prefer, tea or coffee? — Coffee, please.
explanation: Which 用于特定范围内的选择，此处指在茶和咖啡中选。
common_mistake: which(有范围)和what(无范围)的区别。

question: She was ___ to arrive at the party last night.
explanation: the first to do 表示“第一个做某事的人”，序数词前要加 the。
common_mistake: 序数词前必须加 the。

question: He asked for ___ cup of coffee after finishing the first one.
explanation: a second cup 表示“再来一杯”，不定冠词 a + 序数词表示“又一、再一”。
common_mistake: a + 序数词 = another(又一)。

question: About ___ of the students in our school are girls.
explanation: 三分之二的表达是 two thirds，分子大于1时分母用复数。
common_mistake: 分母序数词分子>1时加s。

question: One third of the water ___ polluted in this area.
explanation: 分数修饰不可数名词 water，谓语动词用单数 is。
common_mistake: 分数主谓一致看of后名词。

question: My brother enjoys playing ___ basketball after school.
explanation: 球类运动前不加冠词，play basketball 是固定用法。
common_mistake: 球类前不加冠词！

question: We usually have ___ lunch at twelve o'clock.
explanation: 三餐前一般不加冠词，have lunch 吃午饭。
common_mistake: 三餐前不加冠词。

question: There is a big tree ___ our classroom building.
explanation: in front of 在物体外部的前面；in the front of 在物体内部的前面。树在教学楼外面，用 in front of。
common_mistake: in front of和in the front of意思不同。

question: He tried many times and ___ succeeded.
explanation: in the end 表示“最终、最后”，相当于 finally。
common_mistake: in the end=finally。

question: She bought ___ dress for the party.
explanation: 形容词顺序为“观点+颜色+材料”，即 beautiful red silk。
common_mistake: 性质描述→颜色→材料。

question: I saw ___ birds flying over the lake.
explanation: 形容词顺序“数词+描绘性（观点）+大小+颜色”，即 three lovely little white。
common_mistake: 数词在最前。

question: The fish we caught is still ___. Let's put it back.
explanation: alive 是表语形容词，意为“活着的”。still alive 意为“还活着”。
common_mistake: alive(表语)≠live(定语/直播)。

question: The old man lives ___ and often feels ___.
explanation: live alone 独自居住；feel lonely 感到孤独。alone 是副词，lonely 是形容词。
common_mistake: alone(客观)≠lonely(主观)。

question: Lucy speaks English much ___ than any other student.
explanation: than 提示比较级，well 的比较级是 better。much 修饰比较级。
common_mistake: well的比较级是better。

question: She finished the test ___ than I did.
explanation: than 提示比较级，quickly 是多音节副词，比较级加 more。
common_mistake: -ly副词比较级用more不用-er。

question: My father ___ goes to work by bus because he enjoys walking.
explanation: enjoys walking 提示喜欢走路，所以很少乘公交车，用 seldom。
common_mistake: 频率副词在be后/行为动词前。

question: The little boy isn't ___ to go to school by himself.
explanation: 形容词 + enough 表示“足够……”，old enough 意为“足够年龄”。
common_mistake: 形容词+enough；enough+名词。

question: The ambulance arrived just ___ to save his life.
explanation: in time 及时，刚好赶上；on time 准时。
common_mistake: in time(及时)≠on time(准时)。

question: He didn't take a taxi. ___, he walked.
explanation: Instead 是副词，表示“相反地、而是”，用于对比。Instead of 是介词短语。
common_mistake: Instead(副词)≠Instead of(介词)。

question: When we got to the station, the train ___ already ___.
explanation: 到达车站之前火车已经离开，表示“过去的过去”，用过去完成时 had left。
common_mistake: 两个过去动作中先发生用had done。

question: By the end of last year, they ___ more than 5000 trees.
explanation: by the end of last year 表示到过去某一时间为止，用过去完成时 had planted。
common_mistake: by the end of+过去→过去完成时。

question: Be quiet! The baby ___ in the next room.
explanation: Be quiet! 提示说话时正在进行的动作，用现在进行时 is sleeping。
common_mistake: Look!/Listen!是进行时标志。

question: While my mother ___ dinner, I ___ my homework.
explanation: while 表示两个动作同时持续进行，主从句均用过去进行时。
common_mistake: while引导的从句常用过去进行时。

question: The teacher, together with his students, ___ going to the museum.
explanation: together with 连接主语时谓语动词与前者保持一致，the teacher 单数，用 is。
common_mistake: along with/together with不受就近原则影响。

question: The number of people who own cars ___ increasing.
explanation: the number of 表示“……的数量”，作主语时谓语用单数 is。
common_mistake: the number of→单数。

question: It is important ___ enough sleep before an exam.
explanation: It is + adj. + to do sth. 句型，to get 是真正的主语。
common_mistake: It is+adj+to do。

question: It is very kind ___ you to help the old man.
explanation: It is kind of sb. to do 句型，表示“某人做某事真是好心”，kind 描述人的品质用 of。
common_mistake: of(修饰人)vs for(修饰事)。

question: The problem is too difficult for us ___.
explanation: too...to do 句型，意为“太……而不能”。
common_mistake: too...to后跟动词原形。

question: He needs a quiet room ___.
explanation: 不定式 to study in 作定语修饰 room，room 是 study in 的逻辑宾语，所以需要带上介词 in。
common_mistake: 不及物动词作定语保留介词。

question: ___ English every day is the best way to improve.
explanation: 动名词短语 Practicing English every day 作主语。
common_mistake: 动名词作主语谓语用单数。

question: It's no use ___ about mistakes you've already made.
explanation: It's no use doing sth. 是固定句型，意为“做某事是没用的”。
common_mistake: It's no use+doing不是to do。

question: The book ___ by Mo Yan has been translated into many languages.
explanation: written by Mo Yan 是过去分词短语作后置定语，表示被动，意为“莫言写的书”。
common_mistake: 过去分词(被动/完成)vs现在分词(主动/进行)。

question: I need to ___ before the interview. My hair is too long.
explanation: have sth. done 表示“请别人做某事”，have my hair cut 让别人理发。
common_mistake: have sth done≠have done sth。

question: There ___ a dictionary and two notebooks on the desk.
explanation: There be 句型就近原则，最靠近动词的名词 a dictionary 单数，用 is。
common_mistake: There be就近原则。

question: There ___ a beautiful garden here, but now it's a parking lot.
explanation: There used to be 表示“过去曾经有”。used to be 是正确表达。
common_mistake: There used to be≠sb used to have。

question: Never before ___ such a wonderful performance!
explanation: Never 置于句首时句子要部分倒装，且与 before 连用用现在完成时 have I seen。
common_mistake: 否定副词放句首→部分倒装。

question: — I've never been to the US. — ___.
explanation: Neither have I 表示“我也没去过”，用于否定句之后的相同情况表达。
common_mistake: 赞同否定用Neither/Nor倒装。

question: Let's go out for a walk, ___?
explanation: Let's... 的反意疑问句固定用 shall we。
common_mistake: Let's→shall we；Let us→will you。

question: She hardly ever goes to the cinema, ___?
explanation: hardly 表示否定含义，反意疑问句用肯定形式。goes 是实义动词三单，用 does she。
common_mistake: 前否后肯:否定词后用肯定。

question: It depends on ___ it will rain tomorrow.
explanation: 介词后的宾语从句只能用 whether 引导，不能用 if。
common_mistake: 介词后只能用whether不用if。

question: I don't know ___ to accept his invitation or not.
explanation: whether...or not 是固定搭配，whether 后可直接跟不定式 to accept。
common_mistake: 不定式前用whether不用if。

question: The boy ___ go to sleep ___ his mother told him a story.
explanation: not...until 结构表示“直到……才”，男孩直到妈妈讲故事才睡着。
common_mistake: 短暂动词+not...until。

question: Great changes ___ since the new mayor took office.
explanation: since 引导从句表示“自从……以来”，主句用现在完成时 have taken place。
common_mistake: since+过去→主句用现在完成时。

question: ___ the traffic was heavy, ___ I still arrived on time.
explanation: Although 和 but 不能在同句中同时使用，这里用 Although 引导让步状语从句，主句不用 but。
common_mistake: although/though和but不能共存。

question: ___ hard he tries, he can never please his boss.
explanation: However + adj./adv. + 主谓 表示“无论多么……”，However hard 无论多么努力。
common_mistake: However+adj/adv；Whatever+名词。

question: The problem was ___ difficult ___ few could solve it.
explanation: so + adj. + that 从句，表示“如此……以至于”。
common_mistake: so+adj/adv+that；such+(a/an)+adj+n+that。

question: She got up early ___ she could catch the first bus.
explanation: so that 引导目的状语从句，意为“以便、为了”。
common_mistake: so that(目的)和so...that(结果)结构不同。

question: My sister, ___ works in Shanghai, will come home next week.
explanation: 非限制性定语从句，先行词 sister 指人，关系代词用 who。
common_mistake: 非限定性定语从句不能用that。

question: Tom won first prize, ___ made his parents proud.
explanation: 非限制性定语从句，which 指代前面整个主句的内容，意为“这件事”。
common_mistake: which指代整句;that不能。

question: — Would you mind opening the window? — ___. The room needs fresh air.
explanation: Would you mind...? 表示“介意……吗？”，不介意回答 Of course not（当然不介意）。
common_mistake: Would you mind...不介意用否定词回答。

question: — May I use your dictionary? — ___. Here you are.
explanation: May I...? 请求许可，肯定回答可用 Of course，表示“当然可以”。
common_mistake: May I...→Sure!/Of course!

question: — I'm stressed about the exams. — ___ take a break?
explanation: Why don't you do sth.? 提建议的句型，意为“为什么不……呢？”。
common_mistake: Why don't you+do/Why not+do。

question: — Would you like to join us? — ___. I have to study.
explanation: 委婉拒绝邀请常用 I'm afraid I can't，表示“恐怕我不能去”。
common_mistake: 婉拒:I'm afraid I can't./I'd love to,but...

question: — I'm sorry for breaking your cup. — ___. It was cracked.
explanation: 回应道歉用 That's all right，意为“没关系”。
common_mistake: 道歉应答≠感谢应答。

question: — My grandfather is in hospital. — ___.
explanation: 听到不好的消息应表示同情，用 I'm sorry to hear that。
common_mistake: I'm sorry to hear that=表达同情。

question: This is ___ film I have ever seen. I was deeply moved.
explanation: I have ever seen 提示最高级，the most moving 最令人感动的。
common_mistake: 最高级前必须加the。

question: Shanghai is one of ___ cities in the world.
explanation: one of + the + 最高级 + 复数名词，表示“最……的……之一”。
common_mistake: one of后最高级+复数名词！

question: He is the second ___ student in our class.
explanation: the + 序数词 + 最高级 表示“第几最……的”，the second tallest 第二高的。
common_mistake: 序数词可修饰最高级:the second/third+最高级。

question: Which is ___ season of the year in Beijing?
explanation: 表示三者或以上的比较，要用 the + 最高级。
common_mistake: 最高级前必须加the。单音节重读闭音节双写尾辅音。

question: Don't wake up the ___ baby. She just fell asleep.
explanation: sleeping 是现在分词作定语，表示“正在睡觉的”，asleep 只能作表语。
common_mistake: asleep(表语)≠sleeping(定语)。an asleep baby错。

question: The little girl felt ___ when she saw the big dog.
explanation: felt 是系动词，frightened 形容词化分词作表语，表示“感到害怕的”。frightening 表示“令人害怕的”。
common_mistake: -ed形容词修饰人(感到...)，-ing形容词修饰物(令人...)。

question: He is a ___ man. Everyone knows him in this town.
explanation: well-known 是复合形容词，意为“众所周知的、著名的”。
common_mistake: well-known, well-dressed等复合形容词用well+过去分词。

question: They lived in a ___ house by the lake for many years.
explanation: 形容词顺序为“观点+年龄/新旧+材料”，beautiful old wooden 正确。
common_mistake: 性质描述→新旧→材料。

question: She received a ___ scarf from her best friend.
explanation: 形容词顺序“观点+国籍+材质”，beautiful Chinese silk。
common_mistake: 国籍放在材料之前。

question: On the table there was a ___ bowl filled with fruit.
explanation: 形容词顺序“尺寸+形状+材料”，large round glass。
common_mistake: 大小形状→颜色→材料。

question: He drives much ___ since he got his new glasses.
explanation: much 修饰比较级，carefully 是多音节副词，比较级用 more carefully。
common_mistake: -ly副词比较级用more不用-er。

question: Of all the students, Jane writes ___.
explanation: of all 提示最高级，副词最高级可用 most beautifully。
common_mistake: -ly副词最高级用most。

question: I can't hear you. Could you speak a little ___?
explanation: 比较级 a little louder 表示“大声一点点”，loud 的比较级是 louder。
common_mistake: 形副同形词比较级直接加-er。

question: The plane flew ___ above the clouds. We couldn't see it anymore.
explanation: high 作副词表示具体高度；highly 表示抽象程度，不合题意。
common_mistake: high(空间)≠highly(抽象程度)。

question: I was ___ moved by the story. It almost made me cry.
explanation: deeply 副词表示“深深地”，修饰情感、抽象意义。deep 指深度具体。
common_mistake: deeply(抽象情感)≠deep(空间深度)。

question: Open your mouth ___ so the doctor can check your throat.
explanation: wide 作副词表示“大大地张开”；widely 表示“广泛地”。open wide 意为“张大”。
common_mistake: wide(空间张大地)≠widely(抽象广泛地)。

question: They watched the experiment ___ to make sure nothing went wrong.
explanation: closely 副词表示“仔细地、严密地”；close 作副词表示距离近。
common_mistake: closely(仔细地)≠close(靠近地)。

question: Tom ___ goes to bed before 10 PM. He is a night owl.
explanation: 夜猫子很少早睡，用 seldom 表示“很少”。
common_mistake: 频率副词:always>usually>often>sometimes>seldom>never。

question: We ___ have English classes on Fridays. It's our favorite day.
explanation: 最喜欢的日子，总是有英语课，用 always。
common_mistake: 根据语境选择合适频率副词。

question:
— How ___ do you go to the library?
— Twice a week.
explanation: How often 提问频率，回答 Twice a week 表示频率。
common_mistake: How often(多久一次)≠How long(多长时间)≠How soon(多久以后)。

question: He goes to ___ church every Sunday with his family.
explanation: go to church 表示“去教堂做礼拜”，church 前不加冠词。
common_mistake: go to+地点表目的活动不加the。

question: She was made ___ monitor of her class last week.
explanation: 表示头衔、职务的名词在作补语时通常前面不加冠词，monitor 前零冠词。
common_mistake: 职位/头衔作补语/同位语时不用冠词。

question: My brother is good at playing ___ chess. He practices every day.
explanation: 棋类运动前不加冠词，play chess 下棋。
common_mistake: 棋类/球类前不加冠词。

question: In ___ 1990s, computers were not as common as they are today.
explanation: in the 1990s 表示“在二十世纪九十年代”，年代前要加定冠词 the。
common_mistake: 年代前面加the。

question: ___ more you practice, ___ better you will become.
explanation: the more...the more 结构，表示“越……越……”。
common_mistake: the more...the more...结构两个the都不能省略。

question: My uncle has been in ___ hospital for a week after the accident.
explanation: be in hospital 表示“住院”，不用冠词。be in the hospital 表示在医院（可能在医院工作或探望）。
common_mistake: in hospital(住院)≠in the hospital(在医院里)。

question: Not only the students but also the teacher ___ interested in the project.
explanation: not only...but also 遵循就近原则，the teacher 单数，用 is。
common_mistake: not only...but also遵循就近原则。

question: Either you or your brother ___ to clean the classroom today.
explanation: either...or 就近原则，your brother 单数，用 has to。
common_mistake: either...or就近原则。

question: Both my father and my mother ___ teachers in the same school.
explanation: both...and 连接并列主语谓语用复数 are。
common_mistake: both...and永远用复数动词！

question: Whether we go or ___ depends on the weather forecast.
explanation: whether...or 连接并列成分，前后保持语法形式一致，用动词原形 stay。
common_mistake: whether...or连接两个对等成分。

question: This is not my book. It must be ___.
explanation: someone else 的所有格形式是 someone else's，表示“别人的”。
common_mistake: someone else的所有格是someone else's。

question: It's only ___ walk from my home to the nearest subway station.
explanation: 复数名词的所有格形式，ten minutes' walk 意为“十分钟的步行”。
common_mistake: 时间距离名词所有格:复数以s结尾只加'。

question: These are ___ rooms. They each have their own style.
explanation: 单独的各自拥有，要用各自所有格 Tom's and Jack's。
common_mistake: 各自拥有→每个名词+'s;共同拥有→最后一个+'s。

question: He is a friend of ___. We often play basketball together.
explanation: a friend of mine / my brother's 是双重所有格结构，表示“我的一个朋友/我哥哥的一个朋友”。
common_mistake: a friend of+名词所有格=双重所有格。

question: There are three ___ in the waiting room outside.
explanation: 复合名词 woman doctor 变复数时两部分都需变为复数，即 women doctors。
common_mistake: man/woman+名词两个词都变复数。

question: Several ___ were talking near the school gate.
explanation: passer-by 的复数是 passers-by，在中心词 passer 上加 s。
common_mistake: 复合名词复数:通常将主体名词变复数。

question: He needs two ___ of bread to make sandwiches for the picnic.
explanation: loaf 的复数是 loaves，two loaves of bread 两条面包。
common_mistake: 以f/fe结尾的名词复数变f为v加es。

question: The team ___ discussing their different opinions on the plan right now.
explanation: team 在此指队员，表示个体，谓语用复数 are。
common_mistake: team整体→单数；成员个体→复数。

question: The class ___ made up of 45 students from different backgrounds.
explanation: class 作为整体，谓语用单数 is。
common_mistake: 把集体名词看作一个单位时用单数。

question: The audience ___ clapping their hands excitedly at the end of the performance.
explanation: audience 强调个体观众，用复数 are。
common_mistake: audience强调整体用单数，强调成员用复数。

question: Her ___ birthday is coming next month. We should prepare a gift.
explanation: 第二十个生日，序数词前要加定冠词 the，即 the twentieth。
common_mistake: twentieth拼写:twenty去y加ieth。

question: The boy won ___ prize in the piano competition. His parents were very proud.
explanation: 第一名奖项用 the first prize，序数词前加 the。
common_mistake: 序数词前加the表示"第几"。

question: I have already read two books this week, and I'm starting ___ one tonight.
explanation: a third one 表示在前两个基础上“再读一本”，不定冠词 a + 序数词表示“又一”。
common_mistake: a+序数词=another(又一)。

question: The road is about ___ kilometers long. It's about 3.5 km.
explanation: 三又二分之一表达为 three and a half。
common_mistake: 整数+and+a half。

question: This room is ___ as big as that one.
explanation: 倍数的表达“是……的两倍大”用 twice as big as。
common_mistake: 两倍用twice,三倍及以上用...times。

question: ___ of the information on the Internet is not reliable. You should be careful.
explanation: information 是不可数名词，用 Much 修饰。
common_mistake: 不可数名词用much不是many。

question: We can't finish the project ___ your help. We really need you.
explanation: without your help 意为“没有你的帮助”。根据句意，不能完成项目需要你的帮助。
common_mistake: without(没有)≠with(有)。

question: ___ fire, please break the glass and press the red button.
explanation: In case of fire 意为“万一发生火灾”，是固定搭配。
common_mistake: In case of+名词(万一)；In case+从句。

question: He went to the meeting ___ his boss who was sick that day.
explanation: instead of 意为“代替”，他代替生病的老板去开会。
common_mistake: instead of(介词+名词)≠instead(副词/单独用)。

question: She said she ___ the film twice before, so she didn't want to go.
explanation: said 是过去时，之前看过的动作用过去完成时 had seen。
common_mistake: 宾语从句中主句过去时从句"过去的过去"用过去完成时。

question: The train ___ before we reached the station, so we missed it.
explanation: 火车在我们到达之前就已经离开，过去的过去用过去完成时 had left。
common_mistake: 两个过去动作先发生的用过去完成时。

question: By the time he was ten, he ___ to play the piano for five years.
explanation: by the time 主句表示到过去某时为止，用过去完成时 had learned。
common_mistake: by the time+过去→过去完成时。

question:
— What were you doing at 8 yesterday evening?
— I ___ a report for the meeting.
explanation: 过去点时间 8 pm，用过去进行时 was writing。
common_mistake: 过去具体时刻用过去进行时。

question: Look at the dark clouds! It ___ going to rain soon.
explanation: be going to 结构，主语 It 用 is。
common_mistake: Look!/Listen!→现在进行时。

question: The children ___ happily in the garden when their mother called them for dinner.
explanation: when 引导时间状语从句，主句动作延续，用过去进行时 were playing。
common_mistake: when引导的从句(一般过去)主句常用过去进行时表正在进行的动作。

question: Each of the boys ___ a gift from Santa Claus at the Christmas party.
explanation: each of + 复数名词 作主语，谓语动词用单数 gets。
common_mistake: each of+复数名词→单数动词。

question: Ten years ___ a very long time for a child. A lot can change.
explanation: 时间、金钱、距离等作整体看待时，谓语动词用单数 is。
common_mistake: 时间/距离/金钱作为整体用单数动词。

question: The poor ___ often forgotten by those who live comfortable lives.
explanation: the + 形容词 表示一类人，作主语时谓语用复数 are。
common_mistake: the+形容词表一类人用复数动词。

question: It took us three hours ___ to the top of the mountain.
explanation: It takes sb. some time to do sth. 句型，不定式 to climb 为真正主语。
common_mistake: It takes+时间+to do是固定句型。

question: It is necessary for us ___ enough water every day in summer.
explanation: It is + adj. + for sb. to do sth. 句型，用 to drink。
common_mistake: It is+adj+for sb+to do。for表对象。

question: It is brave ___ the firefighter to run into the burning building to save the child.
explanation: brave 是形容人的品质的形容词，用 of 引出逻辑主语。
common_mistake: of(修饰人品质)vs for(描述事)。

question: He came to my house ___ me to his birthday party the next day.
explanation: 不定式 to invite 作目的状语，表示来的目的是邀请。
common_mistake: to do/in order to do/so as to do表目的。

question: The old man is ___ weak ___ stand up without help. He needs a wheelchair.
explanation: too...to 结构，意为“太……而不能”。
common_mistake: too...to...本身有否定含义(太...而不能)。

question: She is clever enough ___ the problem all by herself.
explanation: enough to do 结构，意为“足够聪明去解决”。
common_mistake: enough+名词；adj/adv+enough+to do。

question: You'd better ___ too much before going to bed. It can affect your sleep.
explanation: had better not do sth.，意为“最好别做某事”，后接动词原形。
common_mistake: had better (not) do→不带to不定式。

question: Why not ___ a short walk after dinner? It helps with digestion.
explanation: Why not + 动词原形，表示建议。
common_mistake: Why not+do/Why don't you+do表建议。

question: I heard her ___ in the next room. She has a beautiful voice.
explanation: hear sb. do sth. 表示听到全过程，强调听到她唱歌。也可以 hear sb. doing，但这里用 sing 表示听到歌声。
common_mistake: 感官动词+sb do(全过程)；+sb doing(正在做)。

question: The boss had his secretary ___ all the documents before the meeting.
explanation: have sb. do sth. 意为“让某人做某事”，用省略 to 的不定式。
common_mistake: have sb do≠have sth done。

question: He insisted on ___ for the dinner even though I offered to pay.
explanation: insist on doing sth.，介词后接动名词 paying。
common_mistake: 介词后动词必须用doing形式。

question: She is afraid of ___ mistakes when speaking English in public.
explanation: be afraid of doing sth.，用动名词 making。
common_mistake: 介词+doing。be afraid of doing。

question: They succeeded in ___ the difficult problem after three hours of hard work.
explanation: succeed in doing sth.，介词 in 后接动名词 solving。
common_mistake: succeed in doing固定搭配。

question: ___ too much sugar is bad for your teeth and overall health.
explanation: 动名词 Eating too much sugar 作主语。不定式也可作主语，但在此处动名词更侧重泛指的行为。
common_mistake: 动名词作主语表抽象的/习惯性动作。

question: There is no ___ what the weather will be like next week.
explanation: There is no knowing 是句型，意为“无法知道”，knowing 为动名词。
common_mistake: There is no doing(无法...)是固定句型。

question: It's worth ___ a little extra for better quality products that last longer.
explanation: be worth doing 固定搭配，动名词 paying。
common_mistake: be worth doing(不用to do)。

question: He stood there with his arms ___ across his chest, looking very confident.
explanation: with + 宾语 + 过去分词 结构，arms 和 fold 是被动关系，用 folded 表示“手臂交叉”。
common_mistake: with+宾语+过去分词表被动/完成状态。

question: The boy felt ___ when he couldn't answer such a simple question.
explanation: felt 是系动词，后接形容词 embarrassed 表示“感到尴尬的”。embarrassing 表示“令人尴尬的”。
common_mistake: -ed形容词(人感到...)/-ing形容词(令人...)。

question: The house ___ in 1950 still looks beautiful after all these years.
explanation: built in 1950 是过去分词短语作后置定语，表示“建于1950年的房子”，表被动。
common_mistake: 过去分词作定语表被动/完成。

question: There seems ___ something wrong with the computer. It won't start.
explanation: There seems to be 是固定句式，表示“似乎有……”。
common_mistake: There be句型中可用seem/appear/happen to be。

question: There ___ a football match and a concert this weekend in our city.
explanation: There be 就近原则，最靠近的主语 a football match 单数，用 is。
common_mistake: There be就近原则:be与最近的名词一致。

question:
— Is there any milk left?
— No, there is ___ left. I'll go buy some.
explanation: none 指代不可数名词 milk，表示“一点也没有了”。nothing 是指事物。
common_mistake: none可指代人或物/可数或不可数;nothing只指事物。

question: Not until the teacher came in ___ talking and sat down quietly.
explanation: Not until 位于句首时，主句要用部分倒装，did the students stop 正确。
common_mistake: Not until放句首主句要部分倒装。

question:
— I don't like horror movies at all.
— ___. They always give me nightmares.
explanation: 否定情况表示“我也不……”，用 Neither do I。
common_mistake: 赞同否定用Neither/Nor+助动词+主语。

question: Only after the examination ___ how much time he had wasted playing games.
explanation: Only + 状语 位于句首时句子部分倒装，did he realize 正确。
common_mistake: Only+状语放句首要部分倒装。

question: I don't think he will come on time, ___? He is always late.
explanation: I don't think 的否定转移，反意疑问句与宾语从句的主谓一致，will he。
common_mistake: I think...的反义疑问句跟从句走。

question: There used to be a post office on this street corner, ___?
explanation: There used to be 的反意疑问句可用 didn't there 或 usedn't there，通常 didn't there 更常见。
common_mistake: used to的反义疑问:didn't/usedn't。

question: Have a cup of tea and relax for a while, ___? I know you're tired.
explanation: 祈使句反意疑问句通常用 will you，表示请求。
common_mistake: 祈使句→will you/won't you?。

question: ___ he can pass the driving test on his first try is still uncertain.
explanation: 引导主语从句表示“是否”，只能用 Whether，不能用 If。
common_mistake: 主语从句/表语从句/同位语从句只能用whether。

question: We are discussing ___ we should take part in the summer camp this year.
explanation: discuss 后的宾语从句常用 whether 引导，表示“是否”。if 也可但不如 whether 正式。
common_mistake: discuss/talk about后只能用whether。

question: The problem is ___ the new plan will actually work in real situations.
explanation: 表语从句表示“是否”，只能用 whether。
common_mistake: 表语从句用whether不用if。

question: Can you remember ___? I want to buy it for my mom's birthday.
options: how much did the dress cost
how much did the dress costed
explanation: 宾语从句用陈述语序，how much the dress cost。cost 的过去式不变。
common_mistake: 宾语从句用陈述语序(主+谓)！

question: I wonder ___ the new shopping mall opens. I want to be the first customer.
explanation: wonder 后接 when 引导的宾语从句，陈述语序。
common_mistake: I wonder后接陈述语序的宾语从句。

question: No one can tell ___ in the future. We can only guess.
explanation: tell 后的宾语从句用陈述语序，what will happen。happen 是不及物动词，无被动。
common_mistake: what作主语时语序保持主+谓不变。

question: Do you know ___ during the summer vacation? I need to make plans.
explanation: 宾语从句陈述语序，where Tom will go。
common_mistake: 疑问词引导的宾语从句用陈述语序。

question: I'll let you know ___ I get any news about the interview results.
explanation: as soon as 引导时间状语从句，意为“一……就……”。
common_mistake: 时间状语从句用一般现在时代替将来时(主将从现)。

question: They have been good friends ever since they ___ in primary school.
explanation: ever since 从句用一般过去时 met，主句用现在完成时。
common_mistake: since+一般过去时→主句用现在完成时。

question: We waited and waited ___ the bus finally arrived an hour later.
explanation: until 表示“直到”，一直等到车来。
common_mistake: 延续动词+until(一直到)；短暂动词+not...until(直到...才)。

question: ___ the weather was so bad, we decided to cancel the outdoor picnic.
explanation: Since 表示“既然、由于”，语气比 because 弱，常置于句首。
common_mistake: Since(既然/已知原因)≠Because(直接因果)。

question: He didn't attend the meeting ___ his serious illness last week.
explanation: because of 后接名词短语 his serious illness。
common_mistake: because of+名词;because+从句。

question: ___ you have finished your homework, you can go out and play with your friends.
explanation: Now that 表示“既然”，引导原因状语从句。
common_mistake: Now that(既然)=Since。

question: The ground is wet this morning, ___ it must have rained during the night.
explanation: for 为并列连词，补充说明推测的原因。
common_mistake: for表推测/补充原因,不放句首。

question: ___ the food was not very good, we still enjoyed the atmosphere of the restaurant.
explanation: Even though 表示“即使”，引导让步状语从句。
common_mistake: Even though=Even if(即使/语气比although强)。

question: Some people love big cities, ___ others prefer living in the peaceful countryside.
explanation: while 在此表示对比，意为“然而”。
common_mistake: while可表对比(而)≠表时间(当...时)。

question: ___ you may disagree, I still believe this is the right decision for our team.
explanation: While 可引导让步状语从句，意为“尽管”。
common_mistake: While放句首=Although表让步。

question: She is ___ a kind teacher ___ all her students love and respect her.
explanation: such a + 形容词 + 可数名词单数 + that 从句，表示“如此……以至于……”。so 用于 so + 形容词 + a + 名词，或 so + 形容词/副词 + that。
common_mistake: such+(a/an)+adj+n+that。

question: There were ___ many people in the store ___ I could hardly move around.
