question: The manager is always busy ___ business affairs.
explanation: be busy with 忙于……。

question: We should protect the children ___ catching cold.
explanation: protect ... from doing 保护……免受。

question: He reads nothing ___ comic magazines.
explanation: nothing except 除了……什么都没有。except 表排除。

question: You should apologize ___ him ___ your rudeness.
explanation: apologize to sb. for sth. 因某事向某人道歉。

question: Alice plans to write an article ___ the history of the Internet.
explanation: on 表示“关于”（较正式）。an article on ... 一篇关于……的文章。

question: He was making a picture of a seabird ___.
explanation: with great care 非常仔细地。修饰 making a picture。

question: There were ten of us ___.
explanation: in all 总共。There were ten of us in all. 我们总共十人。

question: Mary always gets to work ___.
explanation: get to work on time 按时上班。on time 准时。

question: Our group gave the answer ___.
explanation: with one voice 异口同声地。Our group gave the answer with one voice. 我们小组异口同声地回答。

question: "How do you come to know it?" I asked ___.
explanation: asked in surprise 惊奇地问。

question: Mr. Smith isn't here this week. He is away ___.
explanation: on holiday 在度假。固定搭配。

question: I'd like to keep a pet — ___, a dog.
explanation: for example 例如。用来举例说明。

question: He went ___ delivering the milk.
explanation: from door to door 挨家挨户。delivering milk from door to door 挨家挨户送牛奶。

question: His pictures are ___ in London this month.
explanation: on show 在展览中。

question: Much of the information in that book is now ___.
explanation: out of date 过时的。

question: If you give me your photo, I'll give you mine ___.
explanation: in return 作为回报。

question: He is clever, but ___ he makes many mistakes.
explanation: on the other hand 另一方面。表示转折对比。

question: With regard to your recent application, I am afraid we are unable to offer you the job. The underlined part means “___”.
explanation: With regard to 意为“关于”，等于 about。

question: I am in favour of the holiday plan. The underlined part means “___”.
explanation: in favour of 支持，等于 for。

question: Go to the far side of the mountain and you'll see a plain. The underlined part means "___".
explanation: the far side of the mountain 山的另一边，即 beyond the mountain 在山的那一边。

question: All roads lead ___ Rome.
explanation: lead to 通向。All roads lead to Rome 条条大路通罗马。

question: Will it be convenient ___ you to come tomorrow morning?
explanation: convenient for sb. to do 对某人来说方便做某事。

question: a quick and deadly shot, Yi Jianlian won cheers from the basketball fans. ___
explanation: With a quick and deadly shot 以一个又快又致命的投篮（赢得欢呼）。with 表示方式。

question: He drove off ___ high speed.
explanation: at high speed 以高速。固定搭配。

question: The company has provided me ___ a car.
explanation: provide sb. with sth. 给某人提供某物。

question: Success came ___ many failures.
explanation: after many failures 在多次失败之后。

question: What the party says has a big influence ___ the government and the people's lives.
explanation: have an influence on 对……有影响。

question: You must kick the ball ___ the net.
explanation: kick the ball into the net 把球踢进球网。into 表示进入。

question: I admire him ___ his courage.
explanation: admire sb. for sth. 因某事钦佩某人。

question: Simon doesn't know how to achieve a balance ___ his schoolwork and his hobbies.
explanation: a balance between A and B A 和 B 之间的平衡。

question: The poor Mike made so many mistakes ___ his carelessness.
explanation: because of his carelessness 由于他的粗心。because of 后接名词。

question: He is not satisfied ___ what he has achieved.
explanation: be satisfied with 对……满意。

question: I thought for a long time, and ___ I decided to take the job.
explanation: in the end 最终，终于。等于 finally。

question: To begin with, I'd like to tell ___ the importance of the work.
explanation: in brief 简而言之。to begin with 首先，in brief 用来概括。

question: The post office is ___ the street. Which choice is NOT proper?
explanation: out of 表示“从……出来”或“没有”，不能用来表示在对面。

question: It's polite of you to thank the interviewer and say goodbye ___ the end of the interview.
explanation: at the end of 在……结束时。

question: Many foreigners are living and working in Shanghai at present. The underlined part means “___”.
explanation: at present 意为“目前/现在”。

question: Billy hurt his leg while playing football and was sent to hospital at once. The underlined part means “___”.
explanation: at once 立刻，等于 immediately。

question: I saw the young couple watering the flowers in the garden at the moment. The underlined part means “___”.
explanation: saw 是过去时，at the moment 指“那时”，等于 then。

question: Would you like to have a cup of tea ___ a glass of milk?
explanation: 选择疑问句用 or 连接选项。

question: I was going to write to you, ___ I lost your address.
explanation: but 表示转折。本想写信给你，但丢了你的地址。

question: I won't go out tonight ___ it is late.
explanation: for 表示原因（解释说明）。我不会出去了，因为天晚了。

question: Hurry up, ___ you'll miss the first train.
explanation: 祈使句+or 表示“否则”。快点，否则你会错过第一班火车。

question: I'd love to come ___ I can't make it till 8 o'clock.
explanation: but 表转折。我想来，但要到八点才能来。

question: Think hard, ___ you will have an idea.
explanation: 祈使句+and 表示“那么就会”。努力想，那么你就会有主意。

question: The boy had no schooling at all, ___ he didn't know how to write.
explanation: so 表因果关系。根本没上过学，所以不会写字。

question: English ___ Chinese are quite different languages.
explanation: and 连接并列主语 English and Chinese。

question: It was late, ___ we went home.
explanation: so 表示因果关系。天晚了，所以我们回家了。

question: I caught a cold, ___ I had been walking around in the rain.
explanation: for 解释原因。我感冒了，因为之前一直在雨里走。

question: ___ you ___ I am wrong.
explanation: Either you or I am wrong. 不是你错就是我错。就近原则，be 动词与 I 一致用 am。

question: he I are engineers. ___
explanation: Both he and I are engineers. 他和我都是工程师。both...and 连接并列主语，谓语用复数 are。

question: The secretary can ___ speaks ___ writes Spanish.
explanation: both speak and write 既会说又会写。both...and 连接两个动词。

question: Kitty can swim ___ dance ___.
explanation: can swim and dance as well 会游泳也会跳舞。as well 放在句末表示“也”。

question: You can ___ stay at home ___ go to the cinema with us.
explanation: either ... or 表示两者选一。你可以待在家或跟我们去看电影。

question: My father ___ smokes ___ drinks.
explanation: doesn't smoke or drink 不抽烟也不喝酒。否定句中用 or 连接并列成分。

question: Neither you nor I, nor anybody else ___ the answer.
explanation: neither...nor 连接并列主语，就近原则，与 anybody else 一致，用单数 knows。

question: ___(His) his children ___ his wife were invited to the party.
explanation: His children as well as his wife were invited. as well as 连接时，谓语与前面的主语一致，children 复数，用 were。

question: Reading can enlarge (扩大) ___ your knowledge ___ your vocabulary.
explanation: not only ... but also 不仅……而且。阅读既能扩大知识面也能扩大词汇量。

question: ___(The) the students ___ their class teacher is going to visit the
explanation: The students as well as their class teacher are going... 谓语与 the students 一致。

question: The students were quiet ___ the teacher came in.
explanation: as soon as 一……就。老师一进来学生就安静了。

question: I felt very tired last night, ___ I went to bed earlier than usual.
explanation: so 所以。很累，所以早睡。

question: I won't pay you today ___ you finish the work.
explanation: unless = if not 除非。除非你完成工作，否则我今天不会付你钱。

question: Bill Frith's garden is ___ Joe's.
explanation: 比较级 + than。larger than Joe's 比 Joe 的更大。

question: ___ it was so cold, he went out without an overcoat.
explanation: Although 虽然。虽然很冷，他还是没穿外套就出去了。

question: I have been there many times ___ the war.
explanation: since the war 自从战争以来。现在完成时标志。after 后通常用一般过去时。

question: He spoke so fast ___ I could hardly follow what he said.
explanation: so ... that 句型，that 引导结果状语从句。

question: I couldn't sew ___ I was ten.
explanation: not ... until 直到……才。couldn't sew until I was ten 直到十岁才会缝纫。

question: Mum washed the dishes ___ we finished off the delicious dinner.
explanation: after 在……之后。吃完饭后妈妈洗碗。

question: I took a taxi ___ I would be in time for the meeting.
explanation: so that 以便。乘出租车以便赶上会议。

question: ___ is certain that the government will lose the next election.
explanation: It is certain that ... 固定句型，It 作形式主语。

question: ___ he is a doctor is true.
explanation: That 引导主语从句，不作成分，只起连接作用。

question: Do you know ___ he lives?
explanation: where 引导宾语从句，询问地点。

question: It matters little ___ he likes it or not.
explanation: whether ... or not 引导主语从句。It matters little whether ... 他不喜欢关系不大。

question: That's ___ she was absent from school today.
explanation: why 引导表语从句，说明原因。那就是她今天缺席的原因。

question: The teacher taught us ___ we should always do our best.
explanation: taught us that ... that 引导宾语从句。

question: ___ he said is not true.
explanation: What he said 他所说的话。what 引导主语从句，并在从句中作宾语。

question: Could you tell me ___ I can get to the railway station?
explanation: how 如何/怎样。问如何去火车站。

question: The fact is ___ he didn't even take the exam.
explanation: that 引导表语从句，陈述事实。

question: it rains or not won't put off the sports meeting. ___
explanation: Whether it rains or not 引导主语从句，意为“是否下雨”。

question: ___ he is young, he knows a lot.
explanation: Though 虽然。虽然年轻但懂得很多。

question: It doesn't matter ___ we go together or not.
explanation: whether ... or not 引导主语从句。

question: Our teacher teaches us how to be an honest man ___ how to study well.
explanation: as well as 以及。teaches us how to be ... as well as how to study ... 教我们如何做人以及如何学习。

question: We have a discussion about ___ the meeting will be held next month in Shanghai.
explanation: discuss whether 讨论是否……。whether 引导宾语从句。

question: I'll tell him to give you a call ___ he comes back.
explanation: as soon as 一……就。他一回来我就让他给你打电话。

question: Tom had a wish ___ he would have a journey on the moon one day.
explanation: that 引导同位语从句，解释 wish 的内容。

question: ___ you keep ice-cream in a fridge, it melts.
explanation: Unless = if not 如果不/除非。Unless you keep ice-cream in a fridge, it melts. 如果不把冰淇淋放冰箱，它会融化。

question: We have no idea ___ Tom has been in the last few weeks.
explanation: have no idea where ... 不知道汤姆这几周去了哪里。where 引导同位语从句。

question: My mother grows ___ flowers ___ roses and carnations.
explanation: such ... as 像……这样的。such flowers as roses 像玫瑰这样的花。

question: You can ___ phone ___ email to book a plane ticket.
explanation: either ... or 或者……或者。可以打电话或发邮件订票。

question: Call a taxi, ___ you'll catch the lecture.
explanation: 祈使句+and 那么就会。叫辆出租车，那么你就能赶上讲座。

question: It was dark ___ I couldn't see very well.
explanation: so 所以。天黑了，所以我看不太清。

question: They didn't start the task ___ their teacher came back.
explanation: not ... until 直到……才。直到老师回来他们才开始工作。

question: Ships come and go on the river as noisily ___ boats.
explanation: as noisily as boats 像小船一样嘈杂。as ... as 结构，中间用副词原级。

question: Our suggestion is ___ we should take an active part in sports.
explanation: that 引导表语从句。

question: You can take ___ a ferry ___ a train to Paris from London.
explanation: either ... or 二者选一。可以坐渡轮或火车。

question: We should walk as much as possible ___ motor vehicles pollute the air.
explanation: because 因为。我们应该尽量多走路，因为机动车污染空气。

question: we go to bed, Mum always lock all the windows and doors safely. ___
explanation: Before 在……之前。在我们睡觉前，妈妈总是把门窗锁好。

question: I remember the most important points of the story, ___ I've forgotten the details.
explanation: but 表转折。我记得要点，但忘了细节。

question: All the citizens of Hong Kong were very happy ___ Hong Kong returned to our motherland.
explanation: when 当……时候。当香港回归时，市民都很高兴。

question: Hurry up, ___ we'll be late for the train.
explanation: 祈使句+or 否则。快点，否则我们赶不上火车。

question: At first he hated the new job but decided to give himself a few months to see it got any better. ___
explanation: see if 看看是否。他想看看工作是否会变好。if 引导宾语从句。

question: We should learn ___ from books ___ from workers and farmers.
explanation: both ... and 既……又。我们既要向书本学习，也要向工人和农民学习。

question: ___ human beings learn more about space, we will understand better how we live and what we can do to make a better life on Earth.
explanation: As 随着。随着人类对太空了解更多，我们会更好地理解……

question: My brother is tall ___ I am short.
explanation: while 然而（表示对比）。我弟弟高，而我矮。

question: It doesn't matter ___ he is wrong or not on this point.
explanation: whether ... or not 引导主语从句，表示“是否”。

question: She started to cry ___ she heard the story.
explanation: when 当……时候。当她听到故事时，她哭了起来。

question: The father ___ his three children goes skating on the frozen river every Sunday afternoon in winter.
explanation: as well as 以及。主语是 the father（单数），谓语 goes 用单数。

question: You can't pass the exam ___ you study hard.
explanation: unless = if not 除非。除非你努力学习，否则你无法通过考试。

question: It wasn't long ___ they all moved back to the city.
explanation: It wasn't long before ... 不久就……。没过多久他们就都搬回了城里。

question: ___ our team tried best, ___ we lost the game.
explanation: Though 不与 but 连用。Though our team tried best, we lost the game. 虽然尽力了，但还是输了。

question: Don't get off ___ the bus stops.
explanation: not ... until 直到……才。Don't get off until the bus stops. 车停稳再下。

question: Monday Tuesday is OK, I will be free then. ___
explanation: Either ... or 表示两者都行。星期一或星期二都可以。

question: ___ a book sells well depends on who writes it and what it is about.
explanation: Whether 引导主语从句，意为“是否”。一本书是否畅销取决于作者和内容。

question: My question is ___ will be elected chief editor of the school newspaper.
explanation: who 引导表语从句，并在从句中作主语。谁将被选为校报主编。

question: Please forgive Mike for his mistakes ___ he isn't familiar with this job.
explanation: because 因为。原谅他因为他不熟悉这份工作。

question: I would rather fail _ cheat in the examination. ___
explanation: would rather ... than 宁愿……而不愿。would rather fail than cheat 宁愿失败也不作弊。

question: The naughty boy didn't realize ___ mistakes he made ___ the teacher told him.
explanation: what mistakes ... until 直到老师告诉他，他才知道自己犯了什么错误。

question: It is still unknown ___ team will win the World Cup qualifier match.
explanation: which team 哪一队。unknown which team will win 不知道哪队会赢。

question: It occurred ___ him ___ he should help the boy in trouble.
explanation: It occurred to sb. that ... 某人突然想到……

question: Neither my parents nor my teachers agree to my holiday plan, ___ I’ll have to give it up.
explanation: so 因此。没人同意，所以我只好放弃。

question: Martin and his friends didn't eat up all the food they ordered, _ they took the rest away. ___
explanation: so 所以。没吃完所以打包带走。

question: — Would you like to go to the cartoon show with me? ___
explanation: but 表转折。听起来很好玩，但我太忙了。

question: Look up! The kite ___ high in the sky.
explanation: Look up! 提示正在进行的动作，用现在进行时 is flying。

question: We all know that the earth ___ around the sun.
explanation: 客观真理用一般现在时。主语 the earth 单数，用 goes。

question: Jenny ___ a novel from seven to eight last night.
explanation: from seven to eight last night 过去时间段，用过去进行时 was reading。

question: A scarf ___ you warm as the temperature falls.
explanation: as 引导的时间从句用一般现在时，主句用一般将来时 will keep。

question: Finally, the big serious forest fire ___ by the firemen yesterday.
explanation: yesterday 过去时间，火灾是被扑灭的，用一般过去时被动 was put out。

question: Where ___ you ___? I looked for you everywhere.
explanation: have been 表示去过某地已回来，have gone 表示去了未回来。根据语境已找到，用 have been。

question: She didn't go to see the dolphin show with us because she ___ it already.
explanation: didn't go 为过去时，“已经看过”发生在过去之前，用过去完成时 had seen。

question: The teacher told the students that they ___ a school sports meeting the next week.
explanation: 主句 told 过去时，从句 the next week 为过去将来，用 would have。

question: — ___ the flight MU 823 ___?
explanation: 询问航班将何时到达，用一般将来时 Will ... arrive。

question: — This is a no-right-turn area. Don't you see the sign? ___
explanation: 刚才没看见标志，用一般过去时 didn't see。

question: Students ___ wear uniforms at school.
explanation: must 表示“必须”，学校规定学生必须穿校服。

question: We ___ talk or speak loudly in public places like hospitals, libraries or cinemas.
explanation: mustn't 表示“禁止”。在公共场所不得大声喧哗。

question: ___ you tell me how to improve my memory?
explanation: Can you tell me ... 表示请求，意为“你能告诉我……吗？”

question: I ___ neither read nor write at that time.
explanation: at that time 过去，could 是 can 的过去式，表示过去的能力。

question: The conductor said I ___ get off at the next stop.
explanation: said 过去时，must 的过去式是 had to。

question: You ___ talk so loud.
explanation: needn't 不必。You needn't talk so loud. 你不必这么大声说话。

question: Children ___ cross busy streets to go to school.
explanation: don't have to do sth. 不必做某事。

question: — Can children under the age of ten ride bicycles in the city? ___
explanation: mustn't 表示禁止。法律规定十岁以下儿童不得在市区骑自行车。

question: — Must I water the flowers today? ___
explanation: Must I ...? 的否定回答用 No, you needn't。

question: — ___ I park my car here?
explanation: May I ... 请求许可，否定回答可用 can't 或 mustn't。Sorry, you can't. 正确。

question: He ___ eat so greedily.
explanation: ought to 的否定形式为 ought not to 或 oughtn't to。

question: Let's play table tennis, ___?
explanation: Let's ... 的反意疑问句用 shall we。

question: — ___ you please take a message for him?
explanation: Will you please ... 表示礼貌请求。

question: Please erase the words and phrases from the blackboard after class, ___?
explanation: 祈使句反意疑问通常用 will you。

question: — ___ you ___ turning down the radio a bit?
explanation: Would you mind doing ... 介意做某事吗？

question: — ___ we have a word with Susan?
explanation: Shall we ... 提议，回答 Yes, we shall。

question: — ___ I ___ go there alone?
explanation: Ought I to go there alone? 我应当独自去吗？ought to 疑问句将 ought 提前。

question: — ___ you ___ to have some pudding?
explanation: Would you like to have ... 你想要来些布丁吗？

question: You'd better ___ you know when you don't and it's better ___ for an electrician.
explanation: had better not do; it's better to do。not pretend ... to send 正确。

question: — Shall I tell Michael about the news? ___
explanation: Shall I ... 提议，没必要的话用 needn't。

question: — May I use your dictionary? ___
explanation: now 提示现在进行时，am using 表示正在用。

question: I ___ work very late at night when I was young, but now I go to bed early.
explanation: used to do 过去常常做。used to work 过去工作到很晚。

question: I used to ___ up late in the morning when I was in college, but now I'm used to ___ early.
explanation: used to do 过去常做，用 get；be used to doing 习惯于，用 rising。

question: There used to be a small wooden bridge over the river, _? ___
explanation: There used to be 的反意疑问句用 didn't there 或 usedn't there。

question: Glue and tape ___ to stick things together.
explanation: glue and tape 复数，被动语态，用 are used to do。

question: I've lived in Paris for six years now, so I ___ the traffic.
explanation: be used to sth. 习惯于。I am used to the traffic 我习惯了交通。

question: We get so ___ advertisements everywhere that they become largely invisible.
explanation: get used to doing 变得习惯于。get so used to seeing 如此习惯于看到。

question: The firemen ___ water to put out fire.
explanation: 一般现在时，主语 firemen 复数，用 use。消防员用水灭火。

question: People ___ to cross the river by ferry, but now here is a bridge.
explanation: used to do 过去常常。People used to cross 人们过去常乘渡船过河。

question: The train service is better than it ___.
explanation: than it used to be 比以前的好。used to be 后省略了 good。

question: The little boy could ___ the time at the age of three.
explanation: tell the time 是固定搭配，表示“认时间/看钟表”。

question: They were happy to hear the fire engine ___.
explanation: hear the fire engine arrive，arrive 为不及物动词，后面无宾语，不需要介词。

question: There are newspapers ___ the needs of every reader.
explanation: 不定式短语作定语，meet the needs 表示“满足需求”。

question: Some fat people try ___ their weight.
explanation: try to reduce weight 表示“努力减重”。

question: A gas meter ___ the amount of gas you use.
explanation: A gas meter measures the amount of gas you use，表示“测量用气量”。

question: People use umbrellas to ___ the sunlight in hot summer.
explanation: keep off the sunlight 表示“遮挡阳光”。

question: I'm afraid it's too noisy. Could you please ___ the radio a bit?
explanation: too noisy 说明声音太大，用 turn down 表示“调低音量”。

question: The teacher told the children to ___ their exercise-books.
explanation: hand in exercise-books 表示“交练习本”。

question: Mr. Zhang ___ the flat in the city center ___ one million yuan.
explanation: purchase sth. for money 表示“以某价格购买某物”。

question: We should ___ to everyone to save water.
explanation: make an appeal to sb. to do sth. 表示“呼吁某人做某事”。

question: She didn't go to see the dolphin show with us because she ___ it already.
explanation: didn't go 是过去时，“已经看过”发生在之前，用过去完成时。

question: The teacher told us to ___ our hands if we knew the answer.
explanation: raise our hands 表示“举手”，raise 是及物动词。

question: You will soon ___ this climate and then the changes in temperature will not affect you.
explanation: get used to 表示“习惯于”。

question: How many times ___ you ___ that city?
explanation: have been to 表示“去过某地”，可与次数连用。

question: Although they are poor, they have ___ five children very well.
explanation: bring up 表示“养育”。

question: They ___ any help.
explanation: need 作实义动词，否定用 don't need + 名词。

question: My uncle promised to ___ me to the amusement park in Florida during the summer holidays.
explanation: take sb. to a place 表示“带某人去某地”。

question: In ancient China, many palaces ___ in Beijing, Xi'an and Nanjing.
explanation: palaces 是“被建造”，过去时间用一般过去时被动语态。

question: Tom failed in the maths exam, ___?
explanation: failed 为过去式，反意疑问用 didn't he。

question: The little girl ___ ice cream!
explanation: does 用于强调谓语，后接动词原形。

question: I can't decide which T-shirt to buy. The underlined part means "___".
explanation: can't decide = can't make up my mind，表示“不能决定”。

question: The examination turned out to be easy. The underlined part means “___”.
explanation: turn out to be = prove to be，表示“结果是/证明是”。

question: They will leave for Beijing this afternoon. The underlined part means “___”.
explanation: leave for 表示“出发去某地”，与 depart for 同义。

question: Health depends on good food, fresh air and enough sleep. The underlined part means “___”.
explanation: depend on = rely on，表示“依靠/取决于”。

question: The new power station would let out 230,000 tons of carbon dioxide into the air every year. The underlined part means “___”.
explanation: let out 表示“释放/排放”，与 release 同义。

question: The accident happened late last night. The underlined part means "___".
explanation: happen = occur，表示“发生”。

question: He was too angry to control himself. The underlined part means "___".
explanation: control himself 表示“控制自己”，control = have power over。

question: The snow will vanish after the sun rises. The underlined part means "___".
explanation: 雪在太阳升起后消失，即融化，vanish 在此具体含义是 melt。

question: He supported himself by selling newspapers. The underlined part means "___".
explanation: support oneself 表示“养活自己”，与 make a living 同义。

question: When a person decides on something too quickly, he often makes big mistakes. The underlined part means “___”.
explanation: decide on something too quickly 与 jump to conclusions 意思相近，表示“仓促下结论”。

question: It is often ___ that human beings are naturally equipped to speak.
explanation: It is often said that... 是固定句型，意为“人们常说……”。

question: This is the first time we ___ a film in the cinema together as a family.
explanation: This is the first time + 从句用现在完成时。

question: Shirley ___ a book about China last year, but I don't know whether she has finished it.
explanation: last year 提示过去，后文暗示未完成，用过去进行时。

question: Progress ___ so far very good and we are sure that the work will be finished on time.
explanation: so far 是现在完成时标志，progress 不可数名词，用 has been。

question: She stared at the painting, wondering where she ___ it.
explanation: wondering 发生在 stared 同时，看见画在 stared 之前，用过去完成时。

question: Dr Smith, together with his wife and daughters, ___ visit Beijing this summer.
explanation: 主语 Dr Smith 单数，together with 不影响主谓一致，用 is going to。原选项 gong 为拼写错误。

question: Excuse me, Marcia, a reporter from Vanity Fair, ___ all day. Could you
explanation: all day 表示动作延续并强调进行，用现在完成进行时。

question: — What do you think of the movie? ___
explanation: 根据对话判断，回答“我错过了（电影）”，用一般过去时 missed。

question: — You speak very good French! ___
explanation: 叙述过去学习法语经历，用一般过去时。

question: — Hi, Terry, can I use your computer for a while this afternoon? ___
explanation: 说明电脑正在被修理，用现在进行时的被动语态。

question: Dan devoted all the energy he had ___ his novel.
explanation: devote ... to doing sth.，to 是介词。

question: We'll have to ___ how much food we'll need for the party.
explanation: work out 在此表示“计算出/弄清楚”。

question: The two sisters look very much alike. I can't ___ Lily from Linda.
explanation: tell A from B 是固定搭配，表示“区分 A 和 B”。

question: They offered him a very good job, but he ___ it ___.
explanation: turn down 表示“拒绝”。

question: His bicycle was badly ___ in the road accident.
explanation: bicycle 指物，用 damaged 表示“损坏”。

question: Peasants who were ___ of their land went in numbers to the cities.
explanation: rob sb. of sth. 表示“抢走某人的某物”。

question: The man is difficult to ___.
explanation: be difficult to deal with 表示“难以应付”。

question: Blue ___ your skin best.
explanation: suit 表示颜色、款式等适合某人。

question: Modern agriculture enables us to ___ most pests(害虫).
explanation: get rid of pests 表示“除掉害虫”。

question: He's a successful businessman. He can ___ his company well.
explanation: run a company 表示“经营一家公司”。

question: Nancy ___ lots of charity work in her free time since she entered college.
explanation: since + 过去时间，主句用现在完成时。

question: Tara is interested in Chinese culture. She ___ Chinese at Fudan University next year.
explanation: next year 将来时间，用一般将来时。

question: That building is part of Shanghai's history. It ___ many years ago.
explanation: many years ago 过去时间，building 为被建造，用一般过去时被动。

question: Look! Jane's grandmother ___ with some aged people in the park.
explanation: Look! 提示正在发生，用现在进行时。

question: Kevin ___ to work in his hometown after he graduated from university.
explanation: after he graduated 过去时，主句用一般过去时。

question: When summer ___, some children will go to the seaside for fun.
explanation: when 引导时间状语从句，主将从现。

question: I ___ you already that washing hands often will help prevent the A-H1N1 Flu.
explanation: already 与现在完成时连用。

question: He was still working on his project while other people ___ a rest.
explanation: while 从句表示过去同时进行的动作，用过去进行时。

question: Many houses ___ in the big fire a few days ago. What a shame!
explanation: houses 遭受损坏，一般过去时被动。

question: Today is Father's Day. My mother ___ a special dinner for my grandpa now.
explanation: now 提示现在进行时。

question: Tina and her parents ___ to England for sightseeing last summer.
explanation: last summer 一般过去时。

question: The Harry Potter books ___ pretty popular since they were published.
explanation: since 从句用现在完成时，主语 books 复数。

question: A new Park ___ in Shanghai Pudong New Area in the near future.
explanation: in the near future 将来时间，被动语态。

question: Everyone ___ go through the security check when entering the World Expo Park.
explanation: 表示强制性义务，必须通过安检。

question: Students ___ be careful when they do chemical experiments in the lab.
explanation: 做实验必须小心，表示必要性。

question: To everyone's surprise, Alex ___ play chess very well when he was only four.
explanation: 过去的能力用 could。

question: — Must I return the magazine to you right now, Sandy? ___
explanation: Must I...? 否定回答用 needn't。

question: After a long journey, the eight pandas from Wolong safely ___ in Beijing.
explanation: arrive in + 大地点，Beijing 前用 arrived。

question: The room is very dark. I can't ___ anything clearly without a light.
explanation: see 表示“看见”，符合语境。

question: It ___ several years to build Qinghai-Tibet Railway, the highest railway in the world.
explanation: It takes/took + 时间 + to do 表示“花费时间做……”。

question: Your homework is well done. Just ___ some small mistakes in it.
explanation: correct 作动词表示“改正”。

question: John ___ his passport everywhere, but he still couldn't find it.
explanation: look for 表示“寻找”。

question: My teachers have helped me a lot and I'm ___ them.
explanation: be thankful to sb. 表示“感激某人”。

question: The plane from Shanghai to Paris will ___ in an hour.
explanation: 飞机起飞用 take off。

question: The bus is coming. Be careful when you ___ the bus.
explanation: 公交车来了，提醒上车小心，用 get on。

question: You ___ lose your way if you walk alone in the mountains at night.
explanation: may 表示可能性，“可能会迷路”。

question: With the help of the new technology, you ___ e-mail your friends by mobile phone.
explanation: can 表示能够，借助新技术能够用手机发邮件。

question: By the end of last month, I ___ all the CDs of Justin Bieber.
explanation: By the end of last month 过去完成时。

question: Now my father ___ his bike to work every day instead of driving.
explanation: every day 一般现在时，主语三单用 rides。

question: We are glad to hear that the Greens ___ to a new flat next week.
explanation: next week 将来时。

question: An official ___ by some reporters on food problems in Shanghai yesterday.
explanation: yesterday 一般过去时被动。

question: The volunteers ___ a lot of help to the community for nearly ten years.
explanation: for nearly ten years 现在完成时。

question: The students ___ the Art Festival when I passed by their school.
explanation: when 从句过去时，学生正在庆祝，用过去进行时。

question: I'm sure that stricter rules to control cigarette smoking ___ very soon.
explanation: very soon 将来时被动。

question: Though I ___ the phone number many times, the foreigner couldn't write it down.
explanation: repeat the phone number 表示“重复电话号码”。

question: The lady ___ dancing as a hobby in her sixties, and she is really good at it now.
explanation: take up 表示“开始从事（某爱好）”。

question: The bridge enables people to get to the island in less than an hour. The underlined part means “___”.
explanation: enable sb. to do = make it possible for sb. to do。

question: After I rushed out with my camera, the UFO disappeared. The underlined part means “ _”. ___
explanation: disappeared 意为“消失了，看不见了”。

question: Your vocabulary is excellent, but you should improve your pronunciation. The ___
explanation: improve 表示“改善/提高”。

question: In order to get rid of the beggar who followed me for one block, I gave him ten dollars. The underlined part means “___”.
explanation: get rid of 表示“摆脱”，与 get free from 同义。

question: It is ten years since Hong Kong returned to our motherland. The underlined part means “___”.
explanation: return 表示“返回”。

question: The students from Australia were warmly welcomed when they arrived at our school. The underlined part means “___”.
explanation: arrived at = reached，及物动词 reach 直接接宾语。

question: The balloon flew higher and higher and then disappeared in the sky. The underlined part means “___”.
explanation: disappeared 表示“再也看不见了”。

question: The aged people are taken good care of in the nursing home near the lake. The underlined part means “ _”. ___
explanation: be taken good care of = be well looked after。

question: Please raise your hands if you agree to the summer holiday plan. The underlined part means “___”.
explanation: raise your hands = put up your hands 表示“举手”。

question: Most people prefer sending messages to making phone calls. The underlined part means “___”.
explanation: prefer A to B = like A better than B。

question: We all clapped our hands when Jin Jing, the brave Shanghai girl, entered the hall. The underlined part means “___”.
explanation: entered the hall = came into the hall。

question: Jerry hasn't heard from Mary up till now. He is worried about her. The underlined part means "___".
explanation: hear from sb. 表示“收到某人的信”。

question: Lucy got everything ready before going abroad for her further study in arts. The underlined part means “___”.
explanation: got everything ready = prepared。

question: — Must I go to medical school and be a doctor like you, Dad? ___
explanation: Must I...? 否定用 needn't。

question: Look, so many passengers ___ with their smart phones on the underground.
explanation: Look 提示正在发生，passengers 复数。

question: The schoolboy ___ to the blind man on his way home yesterday afternoon.
explanation: yesterday afternoon 一般过去时。

question: The official said they ___ a new law to protect the tourists the next year.
explanation: 主句过去时，the next year 过去将来，用 would make。

question: The traffic is moving very slowly as so many cars ___ on their way back to
explanation: so many cars 复数主语，用 are。

question: ___ carefully, Michael! There's a school ahead.
explanation: 祈使句用动词原形开头。

question: All passengers ___ go through the safety check before they take a plane.
explanation: 乘飞机前必须通过安检，用 must。

question: Aunt Lucy will tell us something about her trip to Australia when she ___
explanation: when 时间状语从句，主将从现。

question: Susan and Lily ___ tomatoes and other vegetables on the farm this time
explanation: this time yesterday 过去进行时。

question: By the end of last week, she ___ in the west of China for two months helping
explanation: By the end of last week 过去完成时。

question: Now Jerry ___ the exchange programme with his classmates in the meeting
explanation: Now 提示现在进行时。

question: Tim told us that his company ___ robots to do some of the work.
explanation: 主句 told 过去时，从句将来用过去将来时 would use。

question: Over $30,000 ___ for a children's hospital by a British girl several months
explanation: several months ago 一般过去时被动。

question: Which of the following underlined parts is different in pronunciation? ___
explanation: fly 中 y 发 /aɪ/，其余发 /i/。

question: Which of the following underlined parts is different in pronunciation? ___
explanation: hate 中 a 发 /eɪ/，其余发 /æ/。

question: — Mum, ___ I visit the Movie Museum tomorrow?
explanation: May I...? 用于礼貌地请求许可。

question: A good friend is someone you ___ share your pleasure and pain with.
explanation: can 表示能够，好朋友是你能分享快乐与痛苦的人。

question: Last week Vivian ___ a dress for her mother with her first-month salary.
explanation: Last week 过去时，buy 过去式 bought。

question: This medicine ___ millions of people's lives since it was put into use.
explanation: since 从句提示现在完成时。

question: Some exchange students ___ with their host families this time yesterday.
explanation: this time yesterday 过去进行时。

question: Several journalists ___ the lawyer about the international case an hour ago.
explanation: an hour ago 一般过去时。

question: The museum ___ next month to celebrate the Science & Technology Festival.
explanation: next month 将来时，被动语态。

question: — ___ I park my car here for a while?
explanation: May I... 请求许可。

question: — Must I do the project on my own? ___
explanation: Must I...? 否定回答用 needn't。

question: Michael ___ in a school in Yunnan from February to June next year.
explanation: from February to June next year 表将来动作，用一般将来时。

question: The film Operation Red Sea ___ a lot of praise since its first show months ago.
explanation: since its first show 现在完成时。

question: The debate on whether to keep pets ___ forty minutes yesterday afternoon.
explanation: yesterday afternoon 一般过去时。

question: ___ your money in the bank is safe.
explanation: 不定式短语 To put your money in the bank 作主语。

question: It's nice of you ___ us so much advice.
explanation: It's nice of you to give... 不定式作真正主语。

question: It's common for people ___ dressed up and ___ out.
explanation: It's common for sb. to do, and 后接并列的不带 to 不定式 go out。

question: Your idea sounds much ___ than his.
explanation: much 后接比较级，interesting 多音节词用 more interesting。

question: Students are required ___ exams honestly.
explanation: be required to do 表示“被要求做某事”。

question: A fireman's job is ___ fire.
explanation: 不定式 to put out fire 作表语，说明消防员的工作。

question: ___ is sometimes hard to understand the humour of another country.
explanation: It 作形式主语，真正主语是 to understand the humour...。

question: It was not easy ___ him to repair that air-conditioner.
explanation: not easy for sb. to do...，用 for。

question: ___ for information or ___ is a very common and necessary activity, especially when we visit a foreign country.
explanation: 动名词作主语，or 连接并列名词 help (Asking for help)。

question: The purpose of sugar is of course ___ the medicine.
explanation: to sweeten the medicine 作表语，不定式。

question: Mr. Brown wants ___ a hotel room when he visits Beijing.
explanation: want to do 表示“想要做某事”。

question: Don't keep ___ in class. Keep quiet!
explanation: keep doing 表示“一直做某事”，keep talking 一直说话。

question: The coffee enabled me ___ up late last night.
explanation: enable sb. to do 表示“使某人能够做……”。

question: Mr. Green's job is ___ a supermarket.
explanation: job 是名词，表语用名词短语 a manager of a supermarket。

question: You ___ come if you don't want to.
explanation: need 作实义动词，否定用 don't need to do。

question: The parents warn their children ___ with fire.
explanation: warn sb. not to do 表示“警告某人不要做某事”。

question: The headmaster's praise for our group singing yesterday made us all _happily. ___
explanation: make sb. do 后接不带 to 的不定式。

question: How happy we are ___ each other in London! What a coincidence!
explanation: 不定式 to see each other 表示原因或情绪产生的原因。

question: I find ___ easy to work out this maths problem.
explanation: find it + adj. + to do，it 为形式宾语。

question: She agreed the homeless animals at last. ___
explanation: agree to do 表示“同意做某事”。

question: All the students didn't see the teacher come in. They went on ___.
explanation: go on doing 表示“继续做同一件事”。

question: I went to the office by taxi this morning ___ be late for work.
explanation: so as not to be late 表示否定目的“为了不迟到”。

question: My elder brother will organize a party, but he hasn't decided ___.
explanation: decide + 疑问词 + to do，表示“决定邀请谁”。

question: My father ___ have a cigarette after a meal, but now he ___ taking a walk.
options: was used to ... is used to
explanation: used to do 过去常常；be used to doing 习惯于。

question: The Shanghai Municipal Government is planning ___ a long tunnel ___ the city centre with Chongming Island.
explanation: plan to build，to link 表示建造隧道的目的。

question: Everyone is welcome ___ the exhibition.
explanation: be welcome to do 表示“欢迎做某事”。

question: ___ is amazing to travel abroad.
explanation: It is amazing to travel abroad，It 作形式主语。

question: I happened ___ there when the fire started.
explanation: happen to be 表示“碰巧在”。

question: It's important ___ part in sports and recreation.
explanation: It's important for sb. to do...，important 描述事情性质用 for。

question: The workers recycle the old newspapers ___ waste them.
explanation: so as not to waste them 表示“为了不浪费它们”。

question: Eardrums allow you ___ sound.
explanation: allow sb. to do 表示“允许某人做某事”。

question: The little girl was _ frightened to cry. ___
explanation: too...to... 表示“太……而不能……”，was too frightened to cry。

question: It was very wise ___ you to bring an umbrella in this weather.
explanation: wise 描述人的品质，用 of you。

question: Please don't forget ___ off the light when you leave.
explanation: forget to do 表示“忘记要做某事”。

question: Father told his boys ___.
explanation: tell sb. not to do 表示“告诉某人不要做某事”。

question: I don't think he has a chance ___.
explanation: a chance to do 表示“做某事的机会”。

question: The water from that river is not fit ___.
explanation: be fit to do 表示“适合做某事”。

question: Mrs. Smith spoke loud enough for everyone in the class to hear ___.
explanation: hear 后需接宾语 her，表示“听到她说话”。

question: Could you lend me a pen ___?
explanation: a pen to write with，不定式作定语，介词 with 不可省略。

question: They seem ___ much progress already in their studies.
explanation: seem to have done 表示“似乎已经做了”。

question: Though he often made his little sister ___, today he was made ___ by his little sister.
explanation: make sb. do（主动省略 to），be made to do（被动还原 to）。

question: Don't you know ___ tomorrow?
explanation: 疑问词 + 不定式，where to go 表示“去哪里”。

question: The book's idea is ___ young people ___ the environment more.
explanation: 动名词短语 making young people protect 作表语，make 后接不带 to 不定式。

question: Don't stop ___ a rest before you finish ___ your homework.
explanation: stop to have a rest 停下来去休息；finish doing 完成做作业。

question: It's better ___ than ___.
explanation: It's better to do than to do，两个不定式对比。

question: What caused the prices ___.
explanation: cause sth. to do 表示“导致某物……”。

question: It takes hard work ___ success.
explanation: It takes hard work to achieve success，不定式作真正主语。

question: The students were made ___ some extra work because they didn't behave well at school.
explanation: be made to do，被动语态中不定式带 to。

question: Mr. Smith always has some good news ___ us.
explanation: has some good news to tell us，不定式作定语。

question: People who suffer from AIDS lose the ability ___ illnesses.
explanation: the ability to do 表示“做某事的能力”。

question: The task proved ___ more difficult than we had expected.
explanation: prove to be 表示“结果是/证明是”。

question: He is determined ___.
explanation: be determined to do 表示“决心做某事”。

question: We elected James ___ chairman.
explanation: elect sb. to be chairman 表示“选举某人当主席”。

question: He told us a funny story, ___ everyone ___.
explanation: 现在分词 making 作结果状语，make sb. do，laugh 用原形。

question: Most American schools don't make their students ___ school uniforms, but pupils in a few private schools have ___ in uniform.
explanation: make sb. do（省略 to）；have to do 表示“不得不”。

question: We'd better ___ off our mobile phones. The meeting will start in a minute.
explanation: had better do 表示“最好做某事”，后接动词原形。

question: Our headmaster asked us ___ a report on how to protect wild animals.
explanation: ask sb. to do 表示“要求某人做某事”。

question: Before going to the History Museum, our teacher told us ___ the public rules.
explanation: tell sb. to do 表示“告诉某人要做……”。

question: The woman feels that she should let her son ___ his own decision this time.
explanation: let sb. do 表示“让某人做某事”，用动词原形。

question: The abacus was used extensively ___ years ago.
explanation: be used to do 表示“被用来做某事”。

question: The football is light enough for a little child ___.
explanation: light enough to raise，raise 的宾语为 football，不需要 it。

question: Much of the area contains plants and animals ___ nowhere else in the world.
explanation: 过去分词 found 作定语，表示“被发现于……”。

question: Viki, the chimpanzee, knew ___ before a picture book after the scientists had taught her for a long time.
explanation: what to do 表示“做什么”，what 为 do 的宾语。

question: He could hardly make himself ___ by others because his English was poor.
explanation: make oneself understood 表示“使自己被理解”。

question: his goal of studying abroad, he tried every means money. ___
explanation: To reach his goal 不定式作目的状语，tried every means to make money。

question: As we all know, it's not polite to keep others ___ for a long time.
explanation: keep sb. doing 表示“让某人一直做某事”。

question: You had better ___ because you have to drive back home.
explanation: had better not do 表示“最好不要做某事”。

question: Stop ___ about the traffic. Just think about what we can do to improve it.
explanation: stop doing 表示“停止做某事”。

question: Don't jump to a conclusion! Let's ___ the problem first.
explanation: Let's + 动词原形表示建议。

question: Even Tony's granddaughter, a five-year-old girl, asked him ___ smoking.
explanation: ask sb. to do 表示“请求/要求某人做某事”。

question: Harry has decided ___ an online shop after graduating from school.
explanation: decide to do 表示“决定做某事”。

question: My friend invite me ___ the art club, and I accepted it with pleasure.
explanation: invite sb. to do 表示“邀请某人做某事”。

question: I can't tell you what she said. I've promised ___ it a secret.
explanation: promise to keep 表示“承诺保守秘密”。

question: Vivian refuses ___ her children to the weekend training center for extra classes.
explanation: refuse to do 表示“拒绝做某事”。

question: Mr. Zhou is good at cooking and he has decided ___ his own restaurant.
explanation: decide to do sth. 表示“决定做某事”，后接动词不定式。

question: Nowadays more and more people think about ___ flats and cars.
explanation: think about doing sth. 表示“考虑做某事”，介词 about 后接动名词。

question: Both Jill and Jenny denied ___ the vase.
explanation: deny doing sth. 表示“否认做过某事”，后接动名词。

question: I noticed that Peter kept ___ at me all the time.
explanation: keep doing sth. 表示“一直做某事”，后接动名词。

question: I have arranged ___ her at ten o'clock.
explanation: arrange to do sth. 表示“安排做某事”，后接动词不定式。

question: I'll go and thank him for ___ to help me.
explanation: thank sb. for doing sth. 表示“感谢某人做某事”，介词 for 后接动名词。

question: My parents always tell me not to waste time ___ computer games.
explanation: waste time (in) doing sth. 表示“浪费时间做某事”，in 可省略，后接动名词。

question: The noise of fisherman ___ the water frightens the fish.
explanation: 动名词复合结构：the noise of fisherman banging the water，of 后接名词 + 动名词表示动作。

question: Energy is the power that makes things ___.
explanation: make sb./sth. do sth. 表示“使……做某事”，省略 to 的不定式。

question: Will you continue ___ grass in your garden after dinner?
explanation: continue doing sth. 表示“继续做同一件事”，后接动名词。

question: Mr.Wang likes ___ delicious dishes, but hates ___ dishes.
explanation: like/hate doing sth. 表示“喜欢/讨厌做某事”，均用动名词形式。

question: Alice often dreams of ___ a great artist.
explanation: dream of doing sth. 表示“梦想做某事”，介词 of 后接动名词。

question: John has admitted ___ the window.
explanation: admit doing sth. 表示“承认做过某事”，后接动名词。

question: Mother is looking forward ___ from her son.
explanation: look forward to doing sth. 表示“期待做某事”，to 为介词，后接动名词。

question: The best method ___ slim is to do exercise regularly.
explanation: the method of doing sth. 表示“做某事的方法”，of 后接动名词。

question: The more you practise ___ English, the better you can communicate with others.
explanation: practise doing sth. 表示“练习做某事”，后接动名词。

question: Would you mind ___ the fan?
explanation: mind one's doing sth. 结构，表示“介意某人做某事”，需用物主代词 + 动名词。

question: ___ are my favourite free time interests.
explanation: 动名词短语作主语，谓语用 are，表示“骑自行车和划船”。

question: We have decided ___ cards instead of ___ television this evening.
explanation: decide to do sth. 和 instead of doing sth.，分别接不定式和动名词。

question: I will try ___ my magazine back from Lily. I remember ___ it to her last week.
explanation: try to do 表示“努力做”；remember doing 表示“记得做过”。

question: It's useless ___ him to stop ___ computer games.
explanation: It's useless doing sth. 和 stop doing sth.，均用动名词。

question: Most young people prefer going out ___ at home.
explanation: prefer doing to doing 表示“比起做……更喜欢做……”，to 为介词。

question: I regretted ___ the question in yesterday's interview.
explanation: regret doing sth. 表示“后悔做过某事”，后接动名词。

question: Have you ever walked into a room and felt ___?
explanation: felt 为系动词，后接形容词。人感到放松用 relaxed。

question: The man over there seems ___ our new math teacher.
explanation: seem to be 表示“似乎是”，后接不定式。

question: If he one day really enters the NBA, ___ English will be an important part of daily life.
explanation: 动名词短语作主语，Understanding English 表示“懂英语”。

question: Well, you shouldn't worry about ___ breakfast then.
explanation: worry about not doing sth. 表示“担心没有做某事”，about 后接动名词，否定在动名词前加 not。

question: Does your English teacher often ask you to do timed (限时的)___?
explanation: timed reading 为固定说法，reading 作名词表示“阅读”。

question: It's embarrassing ___ over in front of others.
explanation: It's + 形容词 + to do sth. 结构，it 为形式主语，不定式为真正主语。

question: The old man has difficulty ___.
explanation: have difficulty (in) doing sth. 表示“做某事有困难”，in 可省略。

question: Although people have told me that ___ is hard, I still enjoy ___.
explanation: 宾语从句中 driving 作主语，enjoy doing 用动名词。

question: Susan finally became a popular singer after she practised ___ for years.
explanation: practise doing sth. 后接动名词。

question: Richard turned off the computer after he had finished ___ the email.
explanation: finish doing sth. 后接动名词。

question: At the police station, the young man admitted ___ my classmate's bicycle.
explanation: admit doing sth. 表示“承认做过某事”。

question: A lot of people watch TV only ___ time.
explanation: 不定式作目的状语，to kill time 表示“消磨时间”。

question: After ___ in the storm for nearly one hour, the helicopter landed safely at last.
explanation: After 为介词，后接动名词 flying。

question: The lights were turned off in many buildings in Sydney on March 31 to help people become more aware of global ___.
explanation: global warming 固定表达，表示“全球变暖”。

question: Each individual feels like ___ a nice dictionary for his or her study.
explanation: feel like doing sth. 表示“想要做某事”，后接动名词。

question: He is in low spirits today. I'm afraid he has no hope ___ the final game.
explanation: no hope of doing sth. 表示“没有做某事的希望”，of 后接动名词。

question: To avoid ___ by others, he slipped out of the meeting room.
explanation: avoid doing sth.，且根据句意为避免被看见，故用动名词的被动形式 being seen。

question: After you finish ___ the classroom, don't forget ___ the door.
explanation: finish doing 和 forget to do（忘记要去做）。

question: The retired couple enjoy ___ photos. They always go out with their cameras.
explanation: enjoy doing sth. 后接动名词。

question: I wouldn't mind ___ a roommate. We can help each other and save money as well.
explanation: mind doing sth. 表示“介意做某事”。

question: Martin was so busy ___ the old that he gave up his part-time job.
explanation: be busy doing sth. 表示“忙于做某事”。

question: After she finished ___ the story, Alice wrote a review for her school newspaper.
explanation: finish doing sth. 后接动名词。

question: Sue practices ___ the violin hard and often gives wonderful performances.
explanation: practise doing sth. 后接动名词。

question: Rainforests also help ___ the weather. In my opinion, our future depends on ___ the rainforests.
explanation: help (to) do 可接不定式，depend on doing 接动名词。

question: Some students are ___ in science.
explanation: be interested in 表示“对……感兴趣”。

question: Trees are one of the biggest and oldest ___ things on earth.
explanation: living 作形容词表示“有生命的”，修饰 things。

question: Early men discovered fire and started eating ___ food.
explanation: cooked food 表示“熟食”。过去分词作定语。

question: There are many cars and buses ___ slowly in the traffic jam.
explanation: 现在分词作定语修饰 cars and buses，表示正在缓慢移动。

question: The police solved the case of the ___ car.
explanation: stolen car 表示“被盗的车”，过去分词表示被动。

question: The footballers did their best ___ the game.
explanation: do one's best to do sth. 表示“尽力做某事”。

question: The fishermen looked ___ when they saw the UFO.
explanation: look 后接形容词，人感到惊讶用 surprised。

question: We decide to get the work ___ before this weekend.
explanation: get sth. done 表示“使某事被做”，过去分词作宾补。

question: I'm ___ what to do.
explanation: 人感到困惑用 puzzled。

question: Canada is a(n)_ country. ___
explanation: English-speaking country 表示“说英语的国家”。

question: We'd better drink ___ water.
explanation: boiled water 表示“煮开过的水”，过去分词作定语。

question: ___ it is to chat with my net-pal on the Internet every day!
explanation: How + 形容词 + it is to do 感叹句型。

question: The students were ___ at the ___ lessons.
explanation: -ed 形容词形容人感到无聊，-ing 形容事物令人无聊。

question: We prefer fresh food to ___ food.
explanation: frozen food 表示“冷冻食品”。

question: It's nothing to be ___.
explanation: to be surprised at 表示“对……感到惊讶”。

question: Most European countries are ___ countries.
explanation: developed countries 表示“发达国家”。

question: The ground was covered with ___ leaves after a strong wind.
explanation: fallen leaves 表示“落叶”，fall 的过去分词作定语。

question: The children were ___ at the very thought of the journey.
explanation: 人感到兴奋用 excited。

question: The little girl was ___ of the fierce dog.
explanation: be frightened of 表示“害怕……”。

question: The lecturer tried to make himself ___ by the listeners.
explanation: make oneself understood 表示“使自己被理解”。

question: Once in the night I woke and heard the wind ___.
explanation: hear sb./sth. doing 表示“听到……正在做某事”。

question: Look, smoke can be seen ___ from the burning house.
explanation: see smoke rising，现在分词表示主动且正在进行的动作。

question: It is ___ to visit the Eiffel Tower and the Arc de Triomphe in Paris.
explanation: It is amazing to do 结构中，amazing 修饰事物。

question: The article is very difficult ___.
explanation: be difficult to do 表示“做某事很困难”，主动形式表被动含义。

question: They found the ground ___ with leaves after the wind.
explanation: find something done 表示“发现某事被做”，过去分词作宾补。

question: Please follow me. I don't want any of you ___ in the forest.
explanation: want sb. to do sth. 表示“想让某人做某事”。

question: He was ___ when he saw the ___ film.
explanation: 人感到害怕用 frightened，事物令人害怕用 frightening。

question: Did you notice a thief ___ into your flat and ___ a lot of things just now?
explanation: notice sb. do sth. 表示“注意到某人做了某事”，省略 to 的不定式。

question: Mr Green is always explaining the texts carefully ___ them ___ clearly by his students.
explanation: 不定式作目的状语；make sth. understood 表示“使……被理解”。

question: Don't make any noise. Let's ___.
explanation: listen to sb. doing 表示“听某人正在做某事”。

question: The novelist created a lot of ___ characters.
explanation: interesting characters 表示“有趣的人物”，-ing 形容词修饰物。

question: Have you read the ___ story in the newspaper?
explanation: leading story 表示“头版头条新闻”。

question: She raised her head when she heard her name ___.
explanation: hear one's name called 表示“听到名字被叫”，过去分词作宾补。

question: It's ___ just to think of the horror movie.
explanation: It is frightening to do 表示“做某事令人害怕”。

question: Who has been selected ___ the chief editor?
explanation: be selected to be 表示“被选为……”。

question: The criminal had his hands ___ behind his back.
explanation: have sth. done 表示“使……被做”，hands tied 指双手被绑。

question: He started out early, ___ to reach the cinema on time.
explanation: 现在分词短语作伴随状语。

question: A ___ diet provides nutrition for your body.
explanation: balanced diet 固定搭配“均衡饮食”。

question: Can you tell me if the book worth ___?
explanation: be worth doing 表示“值得做”。

question: Some people believe that people ___ under the same star sign share similar characteristics.
explanation: people born under... 过去分词短语作定语。

question: If the temperature is raised high enough, smoke can be seen ___.
explanation: see smoke rising，现在分词表示主动动作。

question: Mr. Compton is not a little ___ about his own health.
explanation: be worried about 表示“担心……”。

question: Switzerland's extensive railway system is ___ and comfortable and will allow you to fully enjoy the scenery.
explanation: relaxing 和 comfortable 并列，表示“令人放松且舒适的”。

question: The old lady, together with her grandchildren, ___ in the living room, talking about the good old days.
explanation: together with 不影响主谓一致，主语 the old lady 为单数，用 was seated 表示“坐着”。

question: Cycling has become very popular in recent years. The highest speed ___ on a bicycle is 245 km/h.
explanation: speed recorded 表示“被记录的速度”，过去分词作定语。

question: On Feb.1, 2003 Space Shuttle Columbia broke apart during its return to Earth, ___ its seven crew members.
explanation: 现在分词作结果状语，表示“导致……死亡”。

question: The man ___ a mask is said to be a famous model from France.
explanation: 现在分词短语作定语，表示“戴面具的男人”。

question: He felt so sick that he left the meal ___, which made him feel even worse.
explanation: leave sth. + adj./done 表示“使某物处于未动过的状态”。

question: ___ the parcel, he decided to go to the post office to see what was the matter.
explanation: 分词的完成否定式作原因状语，表示“由于没有收到”。

question: Although travelling by Maglev is expensive, this ___ railway has attracted many people in Shanghai in the ___ Chinese New Year.
explanation: newly-built 表示“新建成的”，freezing 表示“极冷的”。

question: Martin was so busy ___ the old that he gave up his part-time job.
explanation: be busy doing sth. 表示“忙于做某事”。

question: The workers are busy ___ windows to the new building these days.
explanation: be busy doing sth. 后接动名词。

question: When she saw a group of students and teacher ___ bags of rubbish to the bins and cleaning the beach, the scientist was ___ joy.
explanation: see sb. doing 和 was filled with joy。

question: The town government set up a new modern hospital for farmers, ___?
explanation: 反意疑问句，主句 set up 为过去式，主语 the town government 用 it 代替，前肯后否。

question: ___ does a flying saucer look like?
explanation: What does ... look like? 询问外貌，固定句型。

question: My brother never gets up early on Sunday mornings, ___?
explanation: never 表示否定，反意疑问句用肯定形式；gets 为实义动词三单，用 does he。

question: ___ surprising news they have got!
explanation: news 为不可数名词，感叹句用 What + 形容词 + 不可数名词 + 主语 + 谓语！

question: There is nothing important in today's newspaper, ___?
explanation: nothing 表示否定，There be 句型反意疑问句用 is there。

question: ___ interesting it is to chat with you on the Internet every day!
explanation: How + 形容词 + 主语 + 谓语！

question: They hardly have time to listen to music, ___?
explanation: hardly 否定，have 为实义动词，反意用 do they。

question: is it from here to the nearest post office? ___
explanation: 问距离用 How far。

question: ___ enjoyable trip the Spring Outing was!
explanation: trip 为可数名词单数，enjoyable 以元音音素开头，用 What an。

question: — ___ will the next light rail train come?
explanation: 问“多久以后”用 How soon。

question: I wish I could live on Mars! ___
explanation: How I wish... 感叹句。

question: — useful advice it is! Thank you very much. ___
explanation: advice 为不可数名词，用 What + 形容词 + 不可数名词。

question: You dislike playing football, ___?
explanation: dislike 为实义动词，主语 you，反意用 don't you。

question: I don't believe she has told the truth, ___?
explanation: I don't believe 后接宾语从句，反意部分与从句一致，前否后肯，用 has she。

question: He spoke little at the meeting yesterday, ___?
explanation: spoke 过去式，little 否定，反意用 did he。

question: We don't think his sister will come tonight, ___ ?
explanation: We don't think 后接从句，反意部分与从句一致，前否后肯，用 will she。

question: Let us help you to decorate your new house, ___?
explanation: Let us 表示请求允许，反意用 will you。

question: What careless mistakes you've made, ___?
explanation: You've made 为现在完成时，反意用 haven't you。

question: It has been a long time since he left his hometown, ___?
explanation: It has been... 反意用 hasn't it。

question: There has been a great increase in retail sales, ___?
explanation: There has been 反意用 hasn't there。

question: You'd better remain here, ___?
explanation: You'd better = You had better，反意用 hadn't you。

question: You'd like to have a good sleep, ___?
explanation: You'd like = You would like，反意用 wouldn't you。

question: Nobody phoned me while I was out, ___?
explanation: Nobody 否定，反意用肯定形式，指人用 they，过去式用 did they。

question: Clever boys never need to work very hard, ___?
explanation: never 否定，need 在此为实义动词，主语 they，反意用 do they。

question: Let's go to the dining hall together, ___?
explanation: Let's 反意用 shall we。

question: Don't tell him the matter, ___?
explanation: 否定祈使句 Don't... 反意用 will you。

question: — Don't turn off the light, will you? ___
explanation: 同意不关灯，用 No, I won't 表示“好的，我不会关”。

question: — She didn't come to school yesterday, did she? ___
explanation: 反意疑问句的回答根据事实，她没来用 No, she didn't。

question: late for the party! ___
explanation: 祈使句的否定用 Don't be。

question: the teacher and all the students became quiet. ___
explanation: 表示方位副词位于句首，完全倒装，主语为名词用 In came the teacher。

question: You can use my book. ___. Which of the following is improper?
explanation: Here you are 才正确，Here are you 错误。题目要求选不正确的，故为 A。

question: Not until then ___ that he was mistaken, which actually gave me much trouble.
explanation: Not until 置于句首，主句部分倒装，过去时用 did I realize。

question: The movie is not worth the money. I don't like it. ___.
explanation: 前句否定，表示“也不”用 nor + 助动词/情态动词 + 主语。

question: Never ___ such a performance.
explanation: Never 位于句首，句子部分倒装，用 have I seen。

question: Tom asked me to go to play football and ___.
explanation: Tom asked me to go, and so did I 表示“我也去了”。

question: Before the eyes of the bus driver ___, who looked so helpless.
explanation: lie 表示“躺”，过去式 lay，倒装句主语 a wounded girl 放后。

question: He can speak fluent English but he makes a lot of mistakes. ___.
explanation: 当前句既有肯定又有否定，用 So it is with sb. 表示“也如此”。

question: ___ by the riverside is the boy called Tom.
explanation: 现在分词短语位于句首，完全倒装，主语为 the boy。

question: — My room gets very cold at night. ___
explanation: 前句 gets 为实义动词，表示“我的房间也如此”，用 So does mine。

question: — It's burning hot today, isn't it? ___
explanation: 对别人说的观点表示赞同，意为“确实如此”，用 So it is。

question: — Do you like this kind of music? I don't like it. ___
explanation: 前句否定，表示“我也不喜欢”，用 Neither do I。

question: — ___ is it from here to the railway station?
explanation: 问距离用 How far。

question: — ___ will the meeting ___?
explanation: 会议持续多久用 How long，动词用 last。

question: — ___ T-shirt do you like better, the red one or the blue one?
explanation: 有选择范围，问“哪一个”用 Which。

question: — ___ do millions of online users visit the homepage of the government?
explanation: 问原因用 Why。

question: — ___ have you been in the sports club?
explanation: 问一段时间用 How long。

question: The robot can help me sweep the floor. _ smart invention it is! ___
explanation: invention 可数名词单数，smart 以辅音开头，用 What a。

question: — ___ Disney amusement parks are there in China?
explanation: 问可数名词数量用 How many。

question: — Do you know ___ a 5-day trip to Hong Kong costs?
explanation: 问价格用 how much。

question: I am sure ___ Wang Hai will send me a Christmas card before December 25.
explanation: I am sure that... 引导宾语从句，that 无词义只起连接作用。

question: The policeman wondered ___ the traffic accident happened.
explanation: wondered when 表示“想知道什么时候发生事故”。

question: I know ___ he was playing video games from 2 to 4 yesterday afternoon.
explanation: know that 引导宾语从句，表示已知事实。

question: He wanted to know ___ the answer was correct.
explanation: wanted to know whether 表示“想知道是否”。

question: Could you tell me ___ will enter for the discus-throwing at the school sports meeting?
explanation: 宾语从句缺主语指人，用 who。

question: Some scientists said ___ the UFOs had come from other worlds in space.
explanation: said that 引导宾语从句，陈述事实。

question: Some people wonder ___ smart phones will be more popular than books soon.
explanation: wonder whether 表示“想知道是否”。

question: The stranger asked me ___ the underground station is located.
explanation: ask where 表示“问在哪里”。

question: I can't imagine ___ the new robot looks like.
explanation: what ... look like 固定结构，表示“长什么样”。

question: Can you guess ___ this piece of cloth is?
explanation: 问布的长度用 how long。

question: Please tell me ___.
options: how soon the work can finish
how soon the work he can finish
how soon can he finish the work
how soon he can finish the work
explanation: 宾语从句陈述语序，how soon 指“多快”。

question: The clerk at the post office asked Jack ___.
options: how he wanted to post the parcel
how did he want to post the parcel
how does he want to post the parcel
how he wants to post the parcel
explanation: 宾语从句用陈述语序，主句过去时，从句用过去式。

question: Can you tell me ___?
options: why did they give up halfway
why do they give up halfway
explanation: 宾语从句陈述语序，时态与主句一致用过去式。

question: Mr. Johnson asked Mary ___ with her.
explanation: what's the matter 中 what 作主语，变宾语从句语序不变，时态呼应用 was。

question: Mr. Smith didn't tell me ___.
explanation: 宾语从句陈述语序，过去将来时。

question: Susan didn't believe ___.
explanation: 宾语从句陈述语序，主句过去时，告诉发生在之前用过去完成时。

question: Could you tell me ___?
options: how many times has he visited there
explanation: 陈述语序，who 作主语，语句不变。

question: Could you please tell me ___?
options: which is the way to the maglev station
how can I get to the maglev station
how far is the maglev station
explanation: which 作主语，语序不变。

question: Could you tell me ___?
options: where the 2016 Olympics will be held
where the 2016 Olympics would be held
explanation: 宾语从句陈述语序，将来时被动。

question: Kate knows what John ___ now.
explanation: now 提示现在进行时。

question: Alice can tell where Mike ___.
explanation: 一般现在时表示居住地。

question: In the first lesson Miss Liu told us where she ___ from.
explanation: 主句 told 过去时，从句用 came 表示来自某地，已发生。

question: I hope Mary ___ my letter already.
explanation: already 常与现在完成时连用，表示“已经收到”。

question: I think the workers ___ the bridge by the end of last year.
explanation: by the end of last year 提示过去完成时。

question: She asked me if I ___ my homework in an hour.
explanation: 主句 asked 过去时，in an hour 表将来，用过去将来时。

question: Dad asked me what Mum ___ at that time yesterday.
explanation: at that time yesterday 过去进行时。

question: Peter said that he ___ a detective story the day before.
explanation: the day before 与过去完成时连用。

question: The teacher told us that the sun ___ bigger than the stars because it ___ much closer to us.
explanation: 客观真理用一般现在时。

question: I wish I ___ able to tell him all about it last night.
explanation: wish + 过去完成时表示对过去的虚拟。

question: How I wish I ___ to repair the watch! I only made it worse.
explanation: 结合后半句“我只让情况更糟”，希望没有尝试过，对过去虚拟用 hadn't tried。

question: He wishes ___ mistakes.
explanation: wish 后接一般过去时表示对现在的虚拟。

question: I wish I ___ what to do at the moment.
explanation: at the moment 对现在虚拟，用一般过去时 knew。

question: James wishes he ___ the football game instead of the film yesterday.
explanation: wish + 过去完成时表示对过去的虚拟。

question: I wish that I ___ with you last night.
explanation: wish + 过去完成时表示对过去的虚拟。

question: Kunar can take his car apart and put it back together again. I certainly wish he ___ me how.
explanation: wish + would do 表示对将来的愿望，希望他会教我。

question: I wish I ___ my car.
explanation: wish + 过去完成时表示对过去的虚拟。

question: I wish I ___ busy yesterday; I could have helped you with the problem.
explanation: wish + 过去完成时表示对过去的虚拟，否定。

question: I wish I ___ a young man again.
explanation: wish 后的虚拟语气，be 动词用 were。

question: The secretary suggested that they ___ the men in at once.
explanation: suggest 表建议，宾语从句用 should + 动词原形。

question: The Jade Emperor ordered that the Monkey King ___ right away.
explanation: order 后接虚拟语气 (should) + 动词原形，被动为 (should) be arrested。

question: Jane's uncle insisted ___ in this hotel any longer.
explanation: insist 表坚持要求，用虚拟语气 that he (should) not stay。

question: He demanded that the laboratory report ___ immediately after the experiment was done.
explanation: demand 后虚拟语气 (should) + 动词原形，被动为 be written。

question: The man insisted that he ___ there.
explanation: insist 表坚持要求，用虚拟语气 (should) be sent。

question: The teacher agreed to the suggestion that the students ___ two weeks to prepare for the exam.
explanation: suggestion 后同位语从句虚拟语气 (should) + 动词原形，被动为 be given。

question: The white look on his face suggested that he _afraid. ___
explanation: suggested 在此表“暗示”，不用虚拟语气，用陈述语气过去式。

question: I propose that he ___.
explanation: propose 后虚拟语气 (should) not be punished。

question: I recommended that the student ___ his composition as soon as possible.
explanation: recommend 后虚拟语气 (should) + 动词原形，finish 接动名词 writing。

question: The law requires that everyone ___ his car checked at least once a year.
explanation: require that + (should) + 动词原形。

question: We haven't decided whether we ___ a picnic this weekend.
explanation: whether 引导宾语从句表示将来用 will have。

question: Have you discovered who ___ your book by mistake?
explanation: who 主语，动作已发生用过去式 took。

question: The newspaper ___ that a new railway will go through East Forest.
explanation: newspaper 单数，一般现在时用 says。

question: The teacher told the students that the sun ___ eight planets.
explanation: 宾语从句表示客观真理时，用一般现在时，the sun是单数，用has。

question: We asked our teacher when we ___ for our study trip to New York.
explanation: 主句为过去时，从句表示过去的将来，用would set out。

question: Some people believe ___ a person born in the year of the monkey is sociable.
explanation: believe后接that引导的宾语从句，that在口语中可省略。

question: I really don't know ___ I can save some money for my college expenses.
explanation: how表示方式，意为“如何”，引导宾语从句说明怎样省钱。

question: Can you tell me ___ I have passed the exam or not?
explanation: whether ... or not为固定搭配，表示“是否”。

question: Do you know ___ this digital camera costs?
explanation: 询问价格用how much，宾语从句用陈述语序。

question: I'm not sure ___ she refused our invitation.
explanation: why引导宾语从句，表示“为什么”，符合句意。

question: I don't think you have seen such big watermelons, ___?
explanation: 当主句为I don't think等时，反义疑问句与宾语从句一致，用have you。

question: I'd like to know what plants ___ in the greenhouse.
explanation: 宾语从句用陈述语序，there are plants。

question: I don't know ___ to be an astronaut.
explanation: what it's like是what is it like的陈述语序。

question: The tourists want to know ___.
explanation: want to know if... 是宾语从句，if = whether（是否），不是条件状语从句。宾语从句中表示将来的动作要用 will，故选 if it will rain tomorrow。陈述语序（主语 it 在谓语前），排除 C、D。

question: Can you tell me ___?
options: why do you like keeping pets
why did you like keeping pets
why you would like keeping pets
explanation: 宾语从句必须使用陈述语序。

question: It all depends on ___ there in time.
explanation: 介词后常用whether；get there不接to。

question: Can you tell me ___, the Nile or the Amazon?
explanation: 比较两河用longer，宾语从句用which river is longer。

question: Life today is quite different from ___.
explanation: what it used to be表示“过去的样子”，used to后接动词原形。

question: He asked me ___.
options: whether I find out the sender of the money
whether did I find out the sender of the money
whether the sender of the money found out
whether I had found out the sender of the money
explanation: 主句过去时，从句用过去完成时且陈述语序。

question: I doubt ___ she will come.
explanation: doubt在肯定句中常用if/whether引导宾语从句。

question: Mr. Wu said that the sun ___ in the east.
explanation: 太阳从东方升起是客观真理，用一般现在时rises。

question: We promised them that we ___ them all the necessary books as soon as possible.
explanation: 主句过去时，从句表示过去的将来，用would bring。

question: I'd suggest that she ___ Shanghai Grace Church, which was built in 1910.
explanation: suggest that sb. (should) do 虚拟语气，用动词原形visit。

question: I'm not sure ___ he is coming or not.
explanation: whether...or not固定搭配，表示“是否”。

question: I have to ___ that I'm terrible at math.
explanation: admit表示“承认”，符合句意。

question: She ___ why English is important in international communication.
explanation: speak about sth. 意为“谈论某事”。

question: I wish I ___ her the truth. She would have understood.
explanation: wish + 过去完成时表示对过去的虚拟。

question: He doesn't really know ___.
options: how will he solve the problem
explanation: know how to do sth. 表示“知道如何做某事”。

question: A crowd gathered to see ___.
explanation: gathered是过去时，“发生”在先，用过去完成时。

question: Could you please tell us ___ in Shanghai?
options: when will you visit the World Expo
when you will visit the World Expo
when the World Expo will you visit
when the World Expo you will visit
explanation: 宾语从句用陈述语序 will you visit 变为 you will visit。

question: Could you tell me ___?
options: that he will come here soon
who is going to speak at the meeting
explanation: who在宾语从句中作主语，语序不变。

question: He spoke in a quiet distinct voice as though his thought ___.
explanation: as though引导方式状语从句，与现在事实相反，用虚拟语气were。

question: It seems as if it ___ rain.
explanation: as if后接陈述语气表示可能发生的事，is going to表即将。

question: The two strangers talked as if they ___ friends for years.
explanation: as if从句与过去事实相反，用过去完成时had been。

question: ___ there is a will, there is a way.
explanation: Where there is a will, there is a way. 是谚语。

question: I found my book ___ I left there.
explanation: where引导地点状语从句，表示“在……的地方”。

question: He looked as if he ___ ill for a long time.
explanation: as if从句与过去事实相反，用过去完成时。

question: I can't stand him. He always talks as though he ___ everything.
explanation: as though从句与现在事实相反，用一般过去时knew。

question: The hotel will be built ___ there used to be a church.
explanation: where引导地点状语从句，表示“在……的地方”。

question: The child ___ as though he ___ a man.
explanation: 主句用一般现在时talks，as though从句用虚拟语气were表现在相反。

question: He wrote ___.
explanation: 表示用哪只手写用 with his left hand。

question: We ___ delighted if the report ___ true.
explanation: 对现在虚拟，从句用were，主句用should/would + 动词原形，should用于第一人称。

question: If I ___ now, I ___ with you.
explanation: 虚拟条件句与现在事实相反，从句应为went，主句用would go。选项D虽顺序颠倒，但包含正确的词语。

question: If I _ you, I _ more attention to English idioms and phrases. ___
explanation: If I were you 虚拟语气，主句用would pay。

question: If it ___ another ten minutes, the game would have been called off.
explanation: 对过去虚拟，从句用had rained，主句用would have been called off。

question: If the doctor were available, the child ___.
explanation: 与现在事实相反，if用were，主句用would not die。

question: If she ___ more time, she ___ it much better.
explanation: if从句用had（过去式），主句用could do。

question: If he really ___ hard, he ___ easily ___ the examination.
explanation: 对过去虚拟，if用had worked，主句用could pass。

question: If I ___ you, I ___ to the cinema on time.
explanation: If I were you 虚拟语气，主句用would go。

question: If I ___ the money, I would have bought a much bigger car.
explanation: 对过去虚拟，if从句需用过去完成时had had。

question: If you ___ your sense of smell, you ___ flowers or plants.
explanation: 与现在事实相反的虚拟语气，if用lost，主句用couldn't smell。

question: If we ___ here ten minutes earlier, we ___ the bus.
explanation: 与过去事实相反，if用had arrived，主句用would have caught。

question: If I had hurried, I ___ the train.
explanation: 过去虚拟主句用would have caught。

question: If I had known that, I ___ so.
explanation: 与过去事实相反，主句用wouldn't have done。

question: You are late. If you ___ a few minutes earlier, you ___ him.
explanation: 与过去事实相反，if用had come，主句用would have met。

question: If the doctor had come earlier, the poor child ___.
options: would not have been lied there for two hours
would not have laid there for two hours
would not have lied there for two hours
would not have lain there for two hours
explanation: lie的过去分词是lain，意为“躺”。

question: If you had told me in advance, I ___ him at the airport.
explanation: 过去虚拟主句用would have met。

question: I would have gone to the meeting if I ___ time.
explanation: 对过去虚拟，if从句用had had。

question: If she had sewed ___.
options: she would have made a shirt
she would had made a shirt
explanation: 主句用would have done结构。

question: If he ___ here, he ___ you.
options: would have been ... should have helped
would have been ... would had helped
explanation: 对过去虚拟，if用had been，主句用would have helped。

question: If I so busy, I the lecture that day. ___
options: had not been ... would have attended
explanation: 对过去虚拟，if用had not been，主句用would have attended。

question: If you were older, I ___ you to go there tomorrow.
explanation: 与现在事实相反，主句用should/would + 动词原形，should可用于第一人称表虚拟结果。

question: Don't touch the sleeping tiger. If he woke up, he ___ you.
explanation: If he woke up（对现在虚拟）主句用would come to。

question: If it ___ tomorrow, what would we do?
explanation: were to + 动词原形表示将来虚拟。

question: If it ___ rain, we ___ get wet.
explanation: were to rain表将来虚拟，主句用would get wet。

question: If I ___ you, I wouldn't return the call.
explanation: If I were you 虚拟语气，用were。

question: If I ___ breakfast tomorrow, I ___ hungry during classes.
explanation: 真实条件句，从句用一般现在时（won't have），主句用might be。

question: If I ___ you, I ___ worry.
explanation: If I were you, I wouldn't worry. 虚拟语气。

question: If your mother ___ this, she ___ angry.
explanation: 与现在事实相反，if用knew，主句用would be。

question: If he ___ at 3:00 am tomorrow, he ___ home in the evening.
options: were to start, were to get
explanation: were to start对将来虚拟，主句用would get。

question: If he ___ late, tell him ___ here.
explanation: if从句用should come表万一，主句用tell him to wait。

question: Which city is ___, Beijing, Shanghai or Guangzhou?
explanation: 三个城市比较用最高级the biggest。

question: I will eat as ___ as I can.
explanation: as much as I can，much修饰动词eat。

question: A typhoon is much fiercer ___ a breeze.
explanation: 比较级fiercer后用than。

question: Our new flat is twice ___ our old house.
explanation: 倍数表达用twice as ... as。

question: There is ___ ice on the plate than on that one.
explanation: ice不可数，比较级用less。

question: These shoes are too expensive. I'm looking for ___ ones.
explanation: 更便宜的比较级用cheaper。

question: The climate in Kunming is warmer than ___ Ha'erbin.
explanation: that指代climate，in Harbin。

question: The turkey smelt ___ the chicken wings.
explanation: smell为系动词，后接形容词原级比较as ... as。

question: She is ___ than her younger sister.
explanation: 具体重量+比较级。

question: The more we know the world, ___
explanation: the more... the more... 句型，用the more successful。

question: ___ you always eat too little, you may be ill.
explanation: if引导条件状语从句。

question: ___ it was dark, we stopped working.
explanation: As引导原因状语从句，意为“因为”。

question: The headmaster had already left ___ I got to his office.
explanation: when引导时间状语从句，表示“当……时”。

question: He was listening to the music ___ she was cleaning the house.
explanation: while表示两个动作同时进行。

question: ___ I want to be thinner, what do I have to do?
explanation: Since引导原因状语从句，意为“既然”。

question: Would you please look after my baby ___ I'm out?
explanation: while意为“当……的时候”。

question: The teacher didn't begin the class ___ all the students stopped talking.
explanation: not ... until 表示“直到……才”。

question: You shouldn't jump a queue ___ you have something important.
explanation: unless意为“除非”，符合句意。

question: They didn't send their children to school ___ life was hard in those days.
explanation: because引导原因状语从句。

question: ___ you have come, you'd better stay.
explanation: Now that意为“既然”，引导原因状语从句。

question: They didn't go for a walk ___ the strong wind.
explanation: because of后接名词短语the strong wind。

question: You can win ___ you have the will to try hard.
explanation: if引导条件状语从句。

question: We left early ___ we could catch the first train.
explanation: so that引导目的状语从句。

question: ___ anyone has anything else to say, the meeting will be closed.
explanation: Unless意为“除非”，符合句意。

question: I went to the office by taxi this morning ___ be late for work.
explanation: so as not to 表示否定目的。

question: ___ he was very tired, he still stayed up late to work on the computer.
explanation: Although引导让步状语从句。

question: You've done your work carelessly, ___ there are many mistakes.
explanation: so表示结果，意为“因此”。

question: I'll tell him the news ___ he comes back.
explanation: as soon as引导时间状语从句，意为“一……就”。

question: Students must rush out of their classrooms quickly ___ an earthquake happens.
explanation: if引导条件状语从句。

question: Grandpa Wang has donated a lot of money to the poor students ___ he is not rich.
explanation: though引导让步状语从句，意为“尽管”。

question: ___ we destroy the environment, we will destroy ourselves.
explanation: If引导条件状语从句，表示“如果”。

question: ___ people get older, the short-term memory becomes worse.
explanation: When引导时间状语从句，意为“当……时”。

question: John and Billy can't get along ___ their personalities are quite different.
explanation: because引导原因状语从句。

question: The snow will vanish ___ the sun rises.
explanation: when表示“当……时”，太阳升起时雪会融化。

question: ___ the boy is only ten, he can do some washing himself.
explanation: Though引导让步状语从句，意为“虽然”。

question: The lesson was so dull ___ some of the students talked in class.
explanation: so ... that 引导结果状语从句。

question: The teacher gave out the test papers ___ the bell rang.
explanation: as soon as意为“一……就”。

question: Lucy and Lily are twins, but they have completely different characters. Lucy is shy ___ Lily is very active.
explanation: while表示对比，意为“然而”。

question: I viewed a bath when the telephone is too . ___
explanation: was/were doing when ... 句型，表示正在做某事时突然发生另一件事。

question: If you ___ a pin into a balloon, it ___.
explanation: 零条件句表示客观事实，两处都用一般现在时。

question: All of us study hard ___ we can go on to college.
explanation: so that引导目的状语从句。

question: She earns twice as much ___ her husband.
explanation: twice as much as为固定结构。

question: Mr. Li was so excited ___ he couldn't speak at the meeting.
explanation: so ... that 引导结果状语从句。

question: John didn't go to school yesterday ___ he fell ill.
explanation: because引导原因状语从句。

question: In China, children start school ___ they are six years old.
explanation: when引导时间状语从句。

question: I failed in the maths test last time, I will never give up. ___
explanation: Though引导让步状语从句，意为“虽然”。

question: he doesn't have time tomorrow, Mr. Chang won't attend a lecture. ___
explanation: If引导条件状语从句。

question: I will tell my mother the good news ___ she comes back from work.
explanation: as soon as引导时间状语从句。

question: ___ the students were having pair work, the teacher was walking round the classroom in the English class.
explanation: While引导时间状语从句，常与进行时连用。

question: I've been working in a bank ever ___ I left school.
explanation: ever since表示“自从”，常与完成时连用。

question: When the football fans saw Beckham, they got ___ excited ___ they cried out.
explanation: so ... that 引导结果状语从句。

question: ___ he is so hard-working, he would not mind doing extra work for the Students' Union.
explanation: Since引导原因状语从句，意为“既然”。

question: I was waiting in the queue at the bank ___ I suddenly heard a gunshot.
explanation: was doing when ... 表突然发生的事。

question: He told ___ funny stories ___ we all laughed.
explanation: such + 形容词 + 名词 + that 引导结果状语从句。

question: Please take the medicine ___ your doctor advised you.
explanation: as引导方式状语从句，意为“按照”。

question: I found my keys ___ I left them.
explanation: where引导地点状语从句。

question: The lightning goes much faster ___ the thunder.
explanation: 比较级faster后用than。

question: The school provides several optional courses (选修课) ___ the students can attend them during their spare time.
explanation: so that引导目的状语从句。

question: We won't take action ___ everyone agrees.
explanation: unless意为“除非”，符合句意。

question: ___ busy you are, share some time with your parents!
