explanation: no matter how + adj/adv 引导让步状语从句。

question: The two companies decided to work together ___ they had common interests.
explanation: because引导原因状语从句。

question: Don't worry about the lessons ___ you've missed. I'll help you.
explanation: 定语从句修饰lessons，关系代词用which。

question: Is this the calculator ___ you borrowed from Jane?
explanation: 先行词是物，关系代词用that。

question: Is this the museum ___ we'll visit next Sunday?
explanation: which引导定语从句，修饰museum，作visit的宾语。

question: There are a lot of citizens ___ want to speak English.
explanation: citizens指人，定语从句缺主语用who。

question: Among the different sorts of juice, apple juice is the sort ___ I like best.
explanation: sort为物，定语从句用which/that。

question: That's the very car ___ Mary came in the other day.
explanation: 先行词有the very修饰时，关系代词用that。

question: Do you know the girl ___ is singing at the party?
explanation: girl指人，定语从句缺主语，可用that或who。

question: Ozone is a gas ___ protects people from the sun.
explanation: gas为物，定语从句用which。

question: She is my pen pal ___ I wrote to yesterday.
explanation: write to的宾语，先行词指人，用whom。

question: Mrs. Green is the lady ___ purse was lost just now.
explanation: whose purse表示“她的钱包”，所有格。

question: I will never forget the day ___ I joined the Youth League.
explanation: the day作时间状语，用when。

question: The reason ___ I was late for class is that I hadn't caught the bus.
explanation: the reason why ... 定语从句。

question: An orphanage is a place ___ orphan children live.
explanation: where引导定语从句，修饰place，作地点状语。

question: There is never a dull moment in the house ___ we live in.
explanation: live in缺少宾语，用which。

question: October 1, 1949 was the day ___ the People's Republic of China was founded.
explanation: the day作时间状语，用when。

question: Jason has done everything ___ is planned for today.
explanation: 先行词为everything时，关系代词用that。

question: English pubs are places ___ people go to meet their friends, and enjoy a drink and a chat.
explanation: where引导定语从句，修饰places，作地点状语。

question: 1978 was the year ___ our country began to carry out the open policy.
explanation: year作时间状语，可用in which或when。

question: The boy ___ is dressed in yellow won the first prize in the 100-metre dash.
explanation: boy指人，定语从句缺主语用who。

question: A foreign person is anyone ___ is in a country ___ they do not usually live.
explanation: anyone指人用who，country后用where作地点状语。

question: Most of us have visited the site ___ the first National Congress of the Party was held.
explanation: site作地点状语，用where。

question: It is the best film ___ I've ever seen before.
explanation: 先行词有最高级best修饰，关系代词用that。

question: Could you please give the reason ___ warm water freezes faster than cold water?
explanation: the reason why ... 定语从句。

question: Could you tell me the year ___ China first sent the man-made satellite into space?
explanation: the year作时间状语，用when。

question: Zhai Zhigang is the first Chinese ___ walked in space.
explanation: Chinese指人，定语从句缺主语用who。

question: I have got the same dictionary ___ my teacher showed me last week.
explanation: the same ... as 固定搭配。

question: It was nine years ago ___ Sir Alfred returned from America.
explanation: It was ... that 强调句型。

question: This is one of the largest office buildings ___ have been built this year.
explanation: 先行词buildings复数，定语从句用that/which，但one of结构中常用that。

question: Electricity is a kind of energy ___ we use every day.
explanation: energy是us的宾语，关系代词可省略。

question: Was it in the library ___ you borrowed books ___ they met each other?
explanation: 第一个定语从句用where you borrowed books，第二个为强调句型it was...that。

question: Natural gas is a form of energy ___ we use in our daily lives.
explanation: energy作use的宾语，用which。

question: Do you know the scientist ___ invented the light bulb?
explanation: the scientist指人，定语从句缺主语用who。

question: A dictionary is a book ___ gives the meanings and pronunciations of words.
explanation: book为物，定语从句缺主语用that。

question: The lady ___ the driver knocked down was sent to hospital at once.
explanation: knocked down的宾语，先行词指人用whom。

question: Do you know the year ___ the Communist Party of China was founded?
explanation: the year作时间状语，用when。

question: The postman ___ is delivering mails is Mike's father.
explanation: postman指人，定语从句缺主语，可用that或who。

question: Athens is the place ___ the first Olympic Games were held.
explanation: the place作地点状语，用where。

question: That is the reason ___ Tom was absent from school.
explanation: the reason why ... 定语从句。

question: I thought of the days ___ I studied English in middle school.
explanation: the days作时间状语，用when。

question: Have you ever been to the Science Museum ___ we visited yesterday?
explanation: the Science Museum是visited的宾语，用which。

question: I'm one of the boys ___ never late for school.
explanation: 先行词是boys复数，定语从句谓语用are。

question: Do you know that girl ___ wearing a red dress?
explanation: who's = who is，意为“穿着”。

question: September 18, 1931 is the day ___ we'll never forget.
explanation: the day是forget的宾语，用that。

question: The only language ___ is easy to learn is the mother tongue.
explanation: 先行词有the only修饰，用that。

question: The reason ___ I'm writing to you is to tell you about a party on Saturday.
explanation: the reason why ... 定语从句。

question: The beautiful place ___ we spent our holiday last month lies at the foot of a mountain.
explanation: the beautiful place作地点状语，用where。

question: This is one of the largest rooms ___ I've ever slept in.
explanation: 先行词rooms，在定语从句中作slept in的宾语，用that。

question: We traveled together as far as Chicago, ___ we parted.
explanation: Chicago作地点状语，用where。

question: Is the river ___ through that town very large?
explanation: 定语从句用that flows修饰the river。

question: He is the man ___ you think to be worthy of our praise.
explanation: think him to be...的宾语，用whom。

question: “Better late than never,” said the teacher to the boy ___ was behind with his homework.
explanation: boy指人，定语从句缺主语，可用that或who。

question: Mr. Williams received a complaint from a customer ___ was unhappy with the goods ___ he had bought.
explanation: customer用that，goods用that。

question: — Good morning! ___
explanation: Good morning! 的回答仍是Good morning!

question: — How do you do? ___
explanation: 初次见面的问候与回答相同。

question: — Thank you for helping me carry the heavy luggage. ___
explanation: 对感谢的应答，意为“不客气”。

question: — You speak English very fluently. ___
explanation: 对夸奖应表示感谢。

question: — Shall we go to Shanghai Science and Technology Museum? ___
explanation: 对提议表示赞同的应答。

question: — Congratulations! ___
options: No, thank you all the same.
explanation: 对祝贺应表示感谢。

question: — Help yourself to some dumplings. ___
explanation: 婉拒邀请吃东西可回答No, thanks.

question: — Would you like to work at the South Pole in the future? ___
explanation: 接受邀请常用I'd love to.

question: — Shall we have a word with Peter? ___
options: Yes, we should talk to him.
explanation: 对Shall we...?肯定回答常用Yes, let's.

question: — May I speak to Alice? ___
explanation: 电话用语，表示“我就是”。

question: — Can I ask for leave tomorrow? ___
explanation: 委婉拒绝请假的应答。

question: — Would you mind turning down the radio? ___
options: Not at all. I'll be glad to.
explanation: 对Would you mind...?表示不介意且乐意帮忙。

question: — Can I use your computer? ___
explanation: 拒绝借用并说明原因。

question: — What do you think of Chinese food? ___
explanation: 询问看法，应回答味道如何。

question: — That maths lesson is boring, isn't it? ___
explanation: 对反意疑问句表示不同意。

question: — You look tired and pale. ___
explanation: 看见对方脸色不好，询问怎么了。

question: — The trees were blown down by the typhoon last night. ___
explanation: 听到不幸消息表示惋惜。

question: — How are you? ___
explanation: How are you?的标准回答。

question: — Merry Christmas! ___
explanation: 圣诞祝福的常用回答。

question: — I think we should help the children in West China. ___
options: We should help them with their lessons.
explanation: 对方提出“我们应该帮助中国西部的孩子”，表示赞同建议时常用“That’s a good idea.”。

question: — Thank you very much indeed. ___
explanation: 对“Thank you very much indeed.”表示不用谢，常用“Don't mention it.”。

question: — ___ to some peaches.
explanation: “Help yourself to ...”表示“请随便吃/用……”。

question: — Good luck to you! ___
options: It's kind of you to say so.
explanation: 别人祝你好运时，应礼貌地表示感谢。

question: — Shall I get a trolley for you? ___
explanation: 对别人提出帮忙拿手推车，如果不需要，应说“No, thanks.”。

question: — Would you like me to fetch your book? ___
options: Not at all. Thanks a lot.
No, you wouldn't. Thank you all the same.
No, you needn't. Thank you anyway.
explanation: 对“Would you like me to ...?”表示婉拒时，可说“No, you needn't. Thank you anyway.”，意为“不必了，还是谢谢你”。

question: — What can I do for you? ___
options: I'd like to buy a T-shirt.
explanation: “What can I do for you?”常用于购物场景，回答应说明想买什么。

question: — What's your nationality? ___
explanation: 询问国籍“What's your nationality?”，应回答表示国籍的形容词，如 Chinese。

question: — May I go fishing with you, Tom? ___
explanation: “May I ...?”用于请求允许，肯定回答可用“Yes, of course.”。

question: — Must I finish my homework first? ___
explanation: 以 Must I ...? 提问时，否定回答用“No, you needn't.”，表示“不必”。

question: — Would you mind turning on the fan? ___
explanation: “Would you mind turning on the fan?”是在请求对方开风扇，同意帮忙可回答“All right.”。

question: — Let's go and join them, shall we? ___
explanation: 对“Let's ..., shall we?”提出的建议表示赞同时，常用“Yes, let's.”。

question: — How was the football match between China and Japan? ___
options: The score was one to three.
I enjoy every minute of it.
explanation: “How was the football match?”询问比赛怎么样，应回答对比赛的评价。

question: — Is it necessary for us to take some recreation? ___
explanation: 问句为“Is it necessary ...?”，最直接的肯定回答是“Yes, it is.”。

question: — Do you think people will be able to live without food in the future? ___
options: I hope so, but I don't think so.
explanation: 对未来人类是否能不吃食物而生活这一看法，较自然的回答是“我希望如此，但我不这么认为”。

question: — How often does a clerk get his pay? ___
explanation: “How often”询问频率，回答应用“once a month”等表示频率的短语。

question: — I've got a terrible stomachache. ___
options: You'd better not go on working.
You look pale. Don't be upset.
explanation: 对方说胃痛，应给予建议或关心；“你最好不要继续工作”最合适。

question: — I'm sorry to have kept you waiting so long. ___
explanation: 对方因让你久等而道歉，应回答“It doesn't matter.”表示“没关系”。

question: — ___ go playing basketball now?
explanation: “Shall we do sth.?”用于提出建议，意为“我们做某事好吗？”。

question: — Excuse me, may I keep using your calculator for five more minutes? ___
explanation: 对“May I keep using ...?”请求继续使用某物，表示同意可说“No problem.”。

question: — Would you mind my opening the window? ___
explanation: “Would you mind my opening the window?”若不介意，应回答“Of course not.”。

question: — Could you give her a message? ___
explanation: “Could you give her a message?”是请求帮忙，答应可用“Sure.”。

question: — Which do you prefer, to take part in sports or to watch sports? ___
options: It's a good way of relaxing.
explanation: 问句询问更喜欢参加运动还是观看运动，应明确回答自己的偏好。

question: — The cartoon is funny. ___
explanation: 对“The cartoon is funny.”表示赞同，应说“I think so, too.”。

question: — What's the date today? ___
options: It's only ten. It's still early.
explanation: “What's the date today?”询问日期，应回答具体日期。

question: — Pleased to meet you. ___
explanation: 对“Pleased to meet you.”应回应“Pleased to meet you, too.”。

question: — Here are a few presents for you. ___
options: You'd better not give such nice presents.
explanation: 收到礼物时应表示感谢并可表达喜欢。

question: — Happy New Year! ___
explanation: 别人祝你新年快乐时，通常也回应“Happy New Year!”。

question: — I'd like to invite you to my birthday party tonight. ___
options: Thank you. I'll be glad to come.
explanation: 对生日聚会邀请表示接受时，应先感谢，再说明愿意参加。

question: — We're going to have a dance. Would you like to join us? ___
options: I'd love to, but I'm busy. Thank you anyway.
I'm sorry I have no time to come.
explanation: 对邀请表示婉拒时，可说“I'd love to, but ... Thank you anyway.”。

question: — Is there anything else you want to buy? ___
options: Yes, I want a tennis bat.
explanation: 问“还有别的想买吗？”若有，应具体说明想买的东西。

question: — May I ask you some questions about your trip to the South Pole recently? ___
explanation: 对“May I ask you some questions ...?”表示同意，可说“Sure. Please go ahead.”。

question: — Must I leave now? ___
explanation: Must I ...? 的否定回答用“No, you needn't.”。

question: — Please put the waste into the litter bin, will you? ___
explanation: 对祈使句请求“Please put ...”表示同意照做，可回答“All right.”。

question: — Would you mind repairing the MP3 player for me? ___
explanation: “Would you mind repairing ...?”若不介意并愿意帮忙，可回答“Not at all.”。

question: — What kind of food do you like best? ___
options: Prawns are better than any other food.
explanation: 问最喜欢哪种食物，应直接回答“I like ... best.”。

question: — I like detective stories better than any other kind of book. ___
explanation: 前句为肯定句“I like ...”，表示“我也一样”用“So do I.”。

question: — I think people might be able to fly to other worlds in space in the future. ___
explanation: 对别人关于未来的看法表示可能赞同时，可说“Perhaps you're right.”。

question: — Where is Italy on the map of the world? ___
explanation: 在地图上指出某地位置时，可说“Here it is.”。

question: — You look upset. Is anything wrong? ___
explanation: 问“你看起来不安，出什么事了吗？”应说明导致不安的原因。

question: — What would you suggest the tourists do? ___
options: They would go to the Bund.
I suggest going to the Bund.
I suggest they are going to the Bund.
I'd suggest they go to the Bund.
explanation: suggest 后接宾语从句表示建议时，从句常用虚拟语气，即“should + 动词原形”，should 可省略。

question: — I had my bike stolen yesterday. ___
explanation: 听到对方自行车被偷，应表示同情或震惊，“How awful!”最合适。

question: — Thank you very much. ___
explanation: 对感谢的回应可用“My pleasure.”，意为“不客气”。

question: — Would you like me to book a room for you? ___
options: Yes, I like it very much.
explanation: 对别人主动提出帮忙订房，应表示感谢或认可其好意。

question: — Let's go skating together, shall we? ___
explanation: 对“Let's ..., shall we?”表示赞同，常用“Yes, let's.”。

question: — Do you enjoy pop songs or folk songs? ___
options: I don't know about folk songs.
explanation: 选择疑问句“pop songs or folk songs”不能用 yes/no 回答，应选择其一。

question: — Our monitor has got the flu. ___
explanation: 听到别人得了流感，应表示同情。

question: — How did you send the Christmas card to your American friend? ___
explanation: 问“怎样寄圣诞卡给美国朋友”，寄送方式应用“By air mail.”。

question: — Have you entered for any contests? ___
explanation: 现在完成时问是否已报名参加比赛，否定回答可用“No, not yet.”。

question: — What language do Hong Kong people speak as a second language? ___
explanation: 问香港人作为第二语言说什么，答案应为 English。

question: — I'm sorry I left your textbook at the teachers' office. ___
explanation: 对方因把你的课本落在教师办公室而道歉，应回答“That's all right.”表示没关系。

question: — You'd better give up smoking. It's bad for your health. ___
options: That's all right. B. Thank you for your advice.
explanation: 别人建议你戒烟并说明有害健康，应感谢对方的建议。原选项疑似排版错误，应将“Thank you for your advice.”作为 B 项。

question: — I got a C for my chemistry. ___
explanation: 对方化学得了 C，较合适的回应是提出建议“你应该更努力学习”。

question: — I'm sorry I've made a mistake. ___
options: Don't make any excuse. D. What's wrong with you?
explanation: 对方说自己犯了错误并道歉，应安慰说“Don't worry.”。

question: — I'd like to post this parcel to Hong Kong. ___
options: How much is the postage? B. How much does the parcel weigh?
How long does it take to get there?
explanation: 在邮局寄包裹时，工作人员通常需要询问包裹重量。原选项疑似排版错误，应将“How much does the parcel weigh?”作为 B 项。

question: — Have a nice weekend. ___
options: Thank you. The same to you.
explanation: 别人祝你周末愉快，应表示感谢并祝对方也一样。

question: — What day is it today? ___
explanation: “What day is it today?”询问星期几，应回答具体星期。

question: — Can I join you? ___
explanation: “Can I join you?”表示请求加入，较自然的肯定回答是“Sure, you are welcome.”。

question: — What about going boating on the West Lake? ___
explanation: 对“What about going boating ...?”这一建议表示赞同，可说“That sounds interesting.”。

question: — Let's go to school together, shall we? ___
explanation: 对“Let's ..., shall we?”的肯定回答常用“Yes, let's.”。

question: — The iron ball falls faster than the wooden ball. ___
explanation: 指出对方观点错误时，“I'm afraid you're wrong.”语气较委婉礼貌。

question: — David hurt his leg. ___
explanation: 听到 David 伤了腿，应先表示同情或担心，“That's terrible!”较合适。

question: — I'm sorry I've broken your glasses. ___
explanation: 对方因打破你的眼镜而道歉，应回答“Never mind.”表示没关系。

question: — Grandpa didn't use to have some fruit after a meal, did he? ___
explanation: 反意疑问句“didn't ..., did he?”回答时应根据事实。选项中只有“Yes, he did.”形式正确。

question: — Have a good day, Frank! ___
explanation: 别人祝你度过愉快的一天，应表示感谢。

question: — Would you like me to bring you a cup of coffee? ___
explanation: 题目选项中没有最自然的“Yes, please.”或“That's very kind of you.”；相较而言，“That's all right.”可用于婉拒对方帮忙。

question: — How about raising some money for the charity? ___
explanation: 对“How about ...?”提出的建议表示赞同，应说“Good idea.”。

question: — You've done a great job, Grace. ___
explanation: 别人表扬你做得好，应表示感谢。

question: — I'm really sorry to have broken your coffee cup. ___
explanation: 对方因打破杯子道歉，应回答“That's all right.”表示没关系。

question: — Sharon, remember to lock the door before leaving the house. ___
explanation: 对方提醒离开前锁门，应回答“OK. I will.”表示会照做。

question: — Do you know Mr. Lin's telephone number? ___
explanation: “Do you know ...?”是一般疑问句，肯定回答可用“Yes.”。

question: — Don't be late, please. I hate waiting for people. ___
explanation: 前句“I hate waiting for people.”为一般现在时肯定句，表示“我也一样”用“So do I.”。

question: — Would you mind telling me where he lives recently? ___
explanation: “Would you mind telling me ...?”若愿意告诉且不介意，应回答“Not at all.”。

question: — Peter, you've made a few mistakes in the maths test. ___
explanation: 别人指出自己在数学测试中犯了错误，应表示歉意或承认错误。

question: — I think honesty is the most important thing in doing everything. ___
explanation: 对“I think honesty is ...”表示赞同，应说“I think so, too.”。

question: — I'm leaving for Canada on a study trip next week. ___
explanation: 听说对方下周去加拿大游学，应祝对方玩得开心/过得愉快。

question: — Shall we join in the Green World Summer Camp? ___
explanation: 对“Shall we ...?”提出的建议表示赞同，应说“Good idea.”。

question: — Congratulations! You've got a chance to be an exchange student! ___
explanation: 别人向你表示祝贺，应回答“Thank you.”。

question: — Tim and I will visit the exhibition this weekend. Would you like to join us? ___
explanation: 对“Would you like to join us?”表示接受邀请，常用“I'd love to.”。

question: — We'll study in different schools next term. Enjoy your time in the new school! ___
explanation: 对方祝你在新学校过得愉快，你也要去新学校时可回答“The same to you.”。

question: — Remember to print on both sides of the paper. ___
explanation: 对方提醒“记得双面打印”，应答应会照做。

question: — I was just in time to get there for the meeting. Thank you for lending me the bike. ___
explanation: 对感谢“Thank you for lending me the bike.”的回应应为“You're welcome.”。

question: — Mum, ___ I visit the Movie Museum tomorrow?
explanation: 向妈妈请求允许明天参观电影博物馆，用情态动词 may。

question: — Don't throw plastic bags towards the animals in the zoo. ___
explanation: 对“Don't throw ...”这样的劝告或要求，表示会遵守可回答“All right.”。

question: — You look sad, Betty. What's the matter with you? ___
options: I can't attend the summer camp. D. I don't quite agree with you.
explanation: 问“你看起来伤心，怎么了？”应说明伤心的原因。原选项疑似排版错误，C 项应为“I can't attend the summer camp.”。

question: — Excuse me, where is the Moonlight Hotel? ___
explanation: 别人问路，如果不知道，应回答“Sorry, I don't know.”。

question: — The Art Festival is coming. We're going to watch the play Twelfth Night. ___
explanation: 听说对方要去看戏剧演出，应祝对方玩得开心。

question: — Would you like to join me in making cakes tomorrow? ___
explanation: 对“Would you like to join me ...?”表示接受邀请，常用“I'd love to.”。

question: — I'm awfully sorry for bringing you so much trouble. ___
explanation: 对方因给你带来麻烦而道歉，应回答“Never mind.”表示没关系。
